title: "FindMarkersVSManualMarkers"

date: "2025-07-29"

  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
# Read in RDS File
```{r}
# Load your harmony-processed Seurat object
merged_seurat_hmm <- readRDS("/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/seurat_with_panel_k_annotations.rds")
```

# Comprehensive Analysis w/ Z-Scoring
```{r}
# COMPLETE SOPHISTICATED TRIPLE ANNOTATION SYSTEM
# =================================================
# Three independent, sophisticated annotation approaches:
# 1. FindMarkers: Data-driven differential expression
# 2. Manual Signatures: Curated knowledge-based signatures with z-score normalization
# 3. Hybrid Modules: Sophisticated combo score analysis (Up - Down genes)
#
# Each method uses appropriate normalization and threshold strategies

library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyr)
library(viridis)

cat("=== COMPLETE SOPHISTICATED TRIPLE ANNOTATION SYSTEM ===\n")

# ==============================================================================
# CONFIGURATION AND SETUP
# ==============================================================================

CONFIG <- list(
  # File paths - UPDATE TO YOUR SYSTEM
  base_path = "/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/combined_gene_modules",
  
  # FindMarkers thresholds
  findmarkers = list(
    min_pct = 0.25,
    logfc_threshold = 0.25,
    high_conf_markers = 3,
    medium_conf_markers = 1,
    max_cells_per_ident = 500
  ),
  
  # Manual signature thresholds (z-score based)
  manual_signatures = list(
    min_genes = 3,
    ctrl_size = 100,
    high_conf_zscore = 1.5,    # 1.5 SD above mean
    medium_conf_zscore = 1.0,  # 1.0 SD above mean
    low_conf_zscore = 0.5      # 0.5 SD above mean
  ),
  
  # Hybrid signature thresholds (z-score based)
  hybrid_signatures = list(
    strong_zscore = 1.0,       # 1.0 SD above mean
    moderate_zscore = 0.5,     # 0.5 SD above mean
    weak_zscore = 0.2          # 0.2 SD above mean
  ),
  
  # Analysis options
  save_plots = TRUE,
  save_intermediate = TRUE,
  verbose = TRUE,
  filter_ribosomal = TRUE,
  filter_mitochondrial = TRUE
)

# ==============================================================================
# UTILITY FUNCTIONS
# ==============================================================================

# Load hybrid modules with error handling
load_combo_module <- function(filepath, module_name) {
  if (file.exists(filepath)) {
    tryCatch({
      module_data <- read.csv(filepath, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      up_genes <- module_data$Gene[module_data$Regulation == "Up"]
      down_genes <- module_data$Gene[module_data$Regulation == "Down"]
      
      if (CONFIG$verbose) {
        cat(sprintf("%s module: Up = %d, Down = %d\n", 
                   module_name, length(up_genes), length(down_genes)))
      }
      return(list(up = up_genes, down = down_genes))
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("Error loading %s: %s\n", filepath, e$message))
      return(list(up = character(0), down = character(0)))
    })
  } else {
    if (CONFIG$verbose) cat(sprintf("WARNING: File not found: %s\n", filepath))
    return(list(up = character(0), down = character(0)))
  }
}

# Filter out problematic genes
filter_problematic_genes <- function(gene_list) {
  if (CONFIG$filter_ribosomal) {
    gene_list <- gene_list[!grepl("^RP[SL]", gene_list)]
  }
  if (CONFIG$filter_mitochondrial) {
    gene_list <- gene_list[!grepl("^MT-", gene_list)]
  }
  return(gene_list)
}

# ==============================================================================
# DATA LOADING AND SIGNATURE PREPARATION
# ==============================================================================

cat("Loading and preparing gene signatures...\n")

# Load hybrid modules
chc1_module <- load_combo_module(file.path(CONFIG$base_path, "CHC1_Combined_genes.csv"), "CHC1")
chc2_module <- load_combo_module(file.path(CONFIG$base_path, "CHC2_Combined_genes.csv"), "CHC2")
chc3_module <- load_combo_module(file.path(CONFIG$base_path, "CHC3_Combined_genes.csv"), "CHC3")
thc_module <- load_combo_module(file.path(CONFIG$base_path, "THC_Combined_genes.csv"), "THC")

# Define comprehensive manual signatures
manual_signatures <- list(
  # T cell signatures
  "CD4_T_cells" = c("CD3D", "CD3E", "CD4", "IL7R", "CCR7", "LEF1", "TCF7", "SELL", "CD28"),
  "CD8_T_cells" = c("CD3D", "CD3E", "CD8A", "CD8B", "CCL5", "GZMA", "GZMB", "PRF1", "CD27"),
  "Memory_T_cells" = c("IL7R", "CCR7", "CD45RO", "SELL", "TCF7", "LEF1", "CD44", "CD28"),
  "Naive_T_cells" = c("CCR7", "SELL", "TCF7", "LEF1", "IL7R", "CD45RA", "CD62L"),
  "Regulatory_T_cells" = c("FOXP3", "IL2RA", "CTLA4", "IKZF2", "TIGIT", "CD25", "ICOS"),
  "Exhausted_T_cells" = c("PDCD1", "CTLA4", "TIGIT", "LAG3", "HAVCR2", "TOX", "CD244"),
  
  # B cell signatures
  "B_cells" = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B", "CD19", "PAX5", "BLK", "FCRLA", "TCL1A"),
  "Naive_B_cells" = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "TCL1A", "FCRLA", "CD19", "IGHD", "CD38"),
  "Memory_B_cells" = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD27", "CD38", "IGHG1", "IGHG3"),
  "Plasma_cells" = c("IGKC", "IGLC2", "IGLC3", "XBP1", "IRF4", "PRDM1", "CD38", "CD138"),
  "Plasmablasts" = c("XBP1", "IRF4", "PRDM1", "CD38", "CD27", "IGHG1"),
  
  # Myeloid signatures
  "CD14_Monocytes" = c("CD14", "LYZ", "S100A9", "S100A8", "FCN1", "VCAN", "CD68"),
  "CD16_Monocytes" = c("FCGR3A", "MS4A7", "CDKN1C", "VMO1", "CKB", "CD16", "RHOC"),
  "Intermediate_Monocytes" = c("CD14", "FCGR3A", "CD68", "CCR2", "CX3CR1"),
  "Classical_Monocytes" = c("CD14", "CCR2", "CD68", "S100A8", "S100A9"),
  "Macrophages_M0" = c("CD68", "CD163", "MSR1", "MRC1", "CSF1R", "ADGRE1", "LYZ"),
  "M1_Macrophages" = c("CD86", "IL1B", "TNF", "CXCL10", "IL6", "NOS2", "CD80", "STAT1", "IRF1"),
  "M2_Macrophages" = c("ARG1", "IL10", "MRC1", "CD163", "TGFB1", "IL1RN", "STAT6", "MAF", "CD206"),
  "M2a_Macrophages" = c("ARG1", "IL10", "MRC1", "CD163", "IL1RN", "CLEC10A"),
  "M2b_Macrophages" = c("IL10", "IL1B", "TNF", "CD86", "FCGR2B", "SOCS3"),
  "M2c_Macrophages" = c("IL10", "TGFB1", "ARG1", "STAT3", "SOCS3"),
  "Tumor_Associated_Macrophages" = c("CD163", "CD206", "ARG1", "IL10", "VEGFA", "MMP9", "CSF1R"),
  
  # NK cells
  "NK_cells" = c("GNLY", "NKG7", "GZMA", "GZMB", "PRF1", "KLRD1", "KLRF1", "NCAM1", "CD16"),
  "NK_cells_CD56bright" = c("NCAM1", "CD56", "IL7R", "KIT", "GZMA"),
  "NK_cells_CD56dim" = c("FCGR3A", "CD16", "GZMB", "PRF1", "KLRD1"),
  
  # Dendritic cells
  "Conventional_DC1" = c("CLEC9A", "XCR1", "CADM1", "NECTIN2", "SNX22"),
  "Conventional_DC2" = c("CD1C", "FCER1A", "CST3", "CLEC10A", "HLA-DRA"),
  "Plasmacytoid_DC" = c("LILRA4", "TLR7", "ITM2C", "IRF7", "CLEC4C", "TCF4"),
  "Monocyte_derived_DC" = c("CD14", "CD68", "S100A8", "FCER1A", "CD1C"),
  
  # Granulocytes
  "Neutrophils" = c("FCGR3B", "CXCR1", "CXCR2", "S100A12", "CEACAM8", "CSF3R"),
  "Eosinophils" = c("SIGLEC8", "CCR3", "IL5RA", "CLC", "RNASE3"),
  "Basophils" = c("FCER1A", "CPA3", "TPSAB1", "HDC", "IL4"),
  
  # Stromal cells
  "CAF_Inflammatory" = c("IL6", "IL8", "CXCL1", "CXCL2", "CCL2", "PDGFRA", "FAP", "CXCL12"),
  "CAF_Myofibroblastic" = c("ACTA2", "TAGLN", "MYL9", "MYLK", "TPM2", "CNN1", "CALD1", "ACTG2"),
  "CAF_Matrix" = c("COL1A1", "COL1A2", "COL3A1", "COL5A1", "COL6A1", "FN1", "SPARC", "BGN"),
  "CAF_Contractile" = c("ACTA2", "MYH11", "TAGLN", "MYLK", "CNN1", "TPM1", "TPM2"),
  "CAF_Antigen_presenting" = c("HLA-DRA", "HLA-DRB1", "CD74", "CXCL12", "CFD"),
  "CAF_Cycling" = c("MKI67", "TOP2A", "PCNA", "CDK1", "CCNB1"),
  
  # Epithelial cells
  "Epithelial_General" = c("EPCAM", "CDH1", "KRT8", "KRT18", "KRT19", "CLDN3", "CLDN4", "OCLN"),
  "Colonocytes" = c("CDX2", "KRT20", "MUC2", "TFF3", "FABP1", "CA2", "AQP8", "CEACAM6"),
  "Goblet_cells" = c("MUC2", "TFF3", "CLCA1", "AGR2", "SPDEF", "FCGBP", "ATOH1"),
  "Enterocytes" = c("FABP1", "APOA1", "APOA4", "SI", "ALPI", "SLC26A3", "GUCA2A"),
  "Enteroendocrine_cells" = c("CHGA", "CHGB", "TPH1", "GCG", "SST", "CCK"),
  "Paneth_cells" = c("LYZ", "DEFA5", "DEFA6", "CAMP", "REG3A"),
  "Tuft_cells" = c("DCLK1", "TRPM5", "GFI1B", "IL25", "PTGS1"),
  
  # Tumor cells
  "CRC_Tumor_cells" = c("CEACAM5", "CEACAM6", "MYC", "KRAS", "REG4", "SOX9", "CDX1", "LGR5"),
  "Cancer_Stem_cells" = c("LGR5", "ASCL2", "OLFM4", "SMOC2", "CD44", "CD133", "ALDH1A1", "BMI1"),
  "Proliferative_Cancer" = c("MKI67", "PCNA", "TOP2A", "MCM2", "MCM6", "CCNA2", "CCNB1"),
  "EMT_Cancer" = c("VIM", "ZEB1", "ZEB2", "SNAI1", "SNAI2", "TWIST1", "CDH2", "FN1"),
  "Invasive_Cancer" = c("MMP1", "MMP2", "MMP9", "MMP11", "TIMP1", "PLAU", "SERPINE1"),
  
  # Endothelial and vascular
  "Endothelial_cells" = c("PECAM1", "VWF", "CDH5", "PTPRB", "FLT1", "KDR", "TEK", "CLDN5"),
  "Arterial_Endothelial" = c("GJA5", "BMX", "DKK2", "EFNB2"),
  "Venous_Endothelial" = c("NR2F2", "APLNR", "ACKR1"),
  "Lymphatic_Endothelial" = c("PROX1", "CCL21", "LYVE1", "FLT4"),
  "Pericytes" = c("PDGFRB", "ACTA2", "NG2", "RGS5", "MCAM", "NOTCH3", "CSPG4"),
  "Smooth_muscle" = c("ACTA2", "MYH11", "TAGLN", "MYLK", "CNN1", "SMTN", "ACTG2"),
  
  # Other cell types
  "Platelets" = c("PPBP", "PF4", "GNG11", "NRGN", "GP9", "TUBB1", "ITGA2B"),
  "Mast_cells" = c("TPSAB1", "CPA3", "HDC", "KIT", "FCER1A"),
  "Mesenchymal_Stem_cells" = c("THY1", "ENG", "NT5E", "ALCAM", "PDGFRA")
)

# Apply filtering to manual signatures
manual_signatures <- lapply(manual_signatures, filter_problematic_genes)

# Filter signatures by gene availability
available_genes <- rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)
filtered_manual_signatures <- lapply(manual_signatures, function(genes) {
  present_genes <- genes[genes %in% available_genes]
  if (length(present_genes) >= CONFIG$manual_signatures$min_genes) present_genes else NULL
})
filtered_manual_signatures <- filtered_manual_signatures[!sapply(filtered_manual_signatures, is.null)]

if (CONFIG$verbose) {
  cat(sprintf("Manual signatures: %d total, %d with ≥%d genes available\n", 
             length(manual_signatures), length(filtered_manual_signatures), 
             CONFIG$manual_signatures$min_genes))
}

# Create hybrid signatures (SOPHISTICATED APPROACH - YOUR PROVEN METHOD)
hybrid_signatures <- list()
combo_types <- c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")
modules <- list(chc1_module, chc2_module, chc3_module, thc_module)

for (i in seq_along(combo_types)) {
  combo_type <- combo_types[i]
  module <- modules[[i]]
  
  # Create separate Up/Down for combo calculation (CRITICAL for sophisticated method)
  if (length(module$up) > 0) {
    hybrid_signatures[[paste0(combo_type, "_Up")]] <- filter_problematic_genes(module$up)
  }
  if (length(module$down) > 0) {
    hybrid_signatures[[paste0(combo_type, "_Down")]] <- filter_problematic_genes(module$down)
  }
  
  # Also create combined signature for alternative analysis
  if (length(module$up) > 0 || length(module$down) > 0) {
    hybrid_signatures[[combo_type]] <- filter_problematic_genes(c(module$up, module$down))
  }
}

# Filter hybrid signatures by availability
filtered_hybrid_signatures <- lapply(hybrid_signatures, function(genes) {
  present_genes <- genes[genes %in% available_genes]
  if (length(present_genes) >= CONFIG$manual_signatures$min_genes) present_genes else NULL
})
filtered_hybrid_signatures <- filtered_hybrid_signatures[!sapply(filtered_hybrid_signatures, is.null)]

if (CONFIG$verbose) {
  cat(sprintf("Hybrid signatures: %d total, %d with ≥%d genes available\n", 
             length(hybrid_signatures), length(filtered_hybrid_signatures),
             CONFIG$manual_signatures$min_genes))
}

# ==============================================================================
# METHOD 1: SOPHISTICATED FINDMARKERS ANALYSIS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== METHOD 1: SOPHISTICATED FINDMARKERS ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Load or run FindMarkers
if (file.exists("sophisticated_findmarkers_results.csv")) {
  all_markers <- read.csv("sophisticated_findmarkers_results.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  all_markers$cluster <- as.character(all_markers$cluster)
  cat("Loaded existing sophisticated FindMarkers results\n")
} else {
  cat("Running sophisticated FindMarkers analysis...\n")
  
  all_markers <- FindAllMarkers(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    only.pos = TRUE,
    min.pct = CONFIG$findmarkers$min_pct,
    logfc.threshold = CONFIG$findmarkers$logfc_threshold,
    test.use = "wilcox",
    max.cells.per.ident = CONFIG$findmarkers$max_cells_per_ident,
    return.thresh = 0.01,
    verbose = CONFIG$verbose
  )
  all_markers$cluster <- as.character(all_markers$cluster)
  
  if (CONFIG$save_intermediate) {
    write.csv(all_markers, "sophisticated_findmarkers_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  }
}

# Enhanced cell type inference (FIXED)
infer_cell_type_from_markers <- function(top_genes, cluster_id) {
  markers_str <- paste(tolower(top_genes), collapse = " ")
  confidence_scores <- numeric(0)  # Initialize as numeric vector, not list
  confidence_names <- character(0)  # Store names separately
  
  # T cell family
  if (any(grepl("cd3d|cd3e|cd3g", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("cd4", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.9)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "CD4+ T cells")
    }
    if (any(grepl("cd8a|cd8b", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.9)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "CD8+ T cells")
    }
    if (any(grepl("foxp3|il2ra|ctla4", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Regulatory T cells")
    }
    if (any(grepl("il7r|ccr7|sell", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Memory T cells")
    }
    # Add general T cell if no specific subtype detected
    if (length(confidence_scores) == 0 || max(confidence_scores) < 0.8) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "T cells")
    }
  }
  
  # B cell family
  if (any(grepl("ms4a1|cd79a|cd79b|cd19", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("igkc|iglc|xbp1|prdm1", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.9)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Plasma cells")
    } else if (any(grepl("cd27|cd38", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Memory B cells")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "B cells")
    }
  }
  
  # Myeloid family
  if (any(grepl("cd14|lyz|s100a8|s100a9", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("fcgr3a", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "CD16+ Monocytes")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "CD14+ Monocytes")
    }
  }
  
  if (any(grepl("cd68|cd163|msr1|mrc1", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("arg1|il10|cd163", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "M2 Macrophages")
    } else if (any(grepl("il1b|tnf|cd86", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "M1 Macrophages")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Macrophages")
    }
  }
  
  # NK cells
  if (any(grepl("gnly|nkg7|klrd1|ncam1", markers_str))) {
    confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
    confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "NK cells")
  }
  
  # Dendritic cells
  if (any(grepl("fcer1a|clec10a|cd1c", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("lilra4|irf7", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Plasmacytoid DCs")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Dendritic cells")
    }
  }
  
  # Epithelial cells
  if (any(grepl("epcam|krt8|krt18|krt19", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("muc2|tff3|goblet", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Goblet cells")
    } else if (any(grepl("cdx2|fabp1", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Colonocytes")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Epithelial cells")
    }
  }
  
  # CAFs/Fibroblasts
  if (any(grepl("col1a1|col1a2|col3a1|pdgfra", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("acta2|tagln|mylk", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Myofibroblastic CAFs")
    } else if (any(grepl("il6|il8|cxcl", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Inflammatory CAFs")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "CAFs")
    }
  }
  
  # Endothelial
  if (any(grepl("pecam1|vwf|cdh5", markers_str))) {
    confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
    confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Endothelial cells")
  }
  
  # Tumor cells
  if (any(grepl("ceacam5|ceacam6|reg4|sox9", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("ki67|pcna|top2a", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Proliferative cancer cells")
    } else if (any(grepl("lgr5|cd44|aldh1a1", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Cancer stem cells")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Tumor cells")
    }
  }
  
  # Other
  if (any(grepl("ppbp|pf4|gng11", markers_str))) {
    confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
    confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Platelets")
  }
  
  # Return best match or uncharacterized
  if (length(confidence_scores) > 0) {
    best_idx <- which.max(confidence_scores)
    best_match <- confidence_names[best_idx]
    best_confidence <- confidence_scores[best_idx]
    
    return(list(
      annotation = best_match,
      confidence = best_confidence,
      evidence = paste(top_genes[1:min(3, length(top_genes))], collapse = "+")
    ))
  } else {
    return(list(
      annotation = paste("Uncharacterized cluster", cluster_id),
      confidence = 0,
      evidence = paste(top_genes[1:min(2, length(top_genes))], collapse = "+")
    ))
  }
}

# Get sophisticated FindMarkers annotation
get_sophisticated_findmarkers_annotation <- function(cluster_id, markers_data) {
  cluster_markers <- markers_data %>%
    filter(cluster == cluster_id, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%
    arrange(p_val_adj, desc(avg_log2FC))
  
  if (nrow(cluster_markers) == 0) {
    return(list(
      annotation = paste("Cluster", cluster_id),
      confidence = 0,
      biological_confidence = 0,
      method = "No significant markers",
      evidence = "No markers found",
      n_markers = 0
    ))
  }
  
  n_sig_markers <- nrow(cluster_markers)
  top_genes <- cluster_markers$gene[1:min(10, nrow(cluster_markers))]
  
  inference_result <- infer_cell_type_from_markers(top_genes, cluster_id)
  
  marker_confidence <- case_when(
    n_sig_markers >= CONFIG$findmarkers$high_conf_markers ~ "High",
    n_sig_markers >= CONFIG$findmarkers$medium_conf_markers ~ "Medium",
    TRUE ~ "Low"
  )
  
  return(list(
    annotation = inference_result$annotation,
    confidence = n_sig_markers,
    biological_confidence = inference_result$confidence,
    method = paste("FindMarkers", marker_confidence),
    evidence = inference_result$evidence,
    n_markers = n_sig_markers
  ))
}

# ==============================================================================
# METHOD 2: SOPHISTICATED MANUAL SIGNATURE ANALYSIS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== METHOD 2: SOPHISTICATED MANUAL SIGNATURE ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Add module scores for manual signatures
score_cols <- grep("_Score1$", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
manual_score_pattern <- paste(names(filtered_manual_signatures), collapse = "|")
existing_manual_scores <- score_cols[grepl(manual_score_pattern, score_cols)]

if (length(existing_manual_scores) == 0) {
  cat("Adding module scores for manual signatures...\n")
  
  merged_seurat_hmm <- AddModuleScore(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    features = filtered_manual_signatures,
    name = names(filtered_manual_signatures),
    ctrl = CONFIG$manual_signatures$ctrl_size,
    seed = 42
  )
  
  cat("✓ Manual signature module scores added\n")
}

# Z-score normalization for manual signatures
cat("Applying z-score normalization to manual signatures...\n")

all_score_cols <- grep("_Score1$", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
all_score_names <- gsub("_Score1$", "", all_score_cols)

# Filter to only manual signatures (exclude hybrid signatures)
manual_signature_names <- names(filtered_manual_signatures)
manual_only_scores <- all_score_cols[all_score_names %in% manual_signature_names]

if (CONFIG$verbose) {
  cat(sprintf("Found %d manual signature score columns to normalize\n", length(manual_only_scores)))
}

for (score_col in manual_only_scores) {
  zscore_col <- paste0(score_col, "_zscore")
  
  if (score_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, score_col]
    z_scores <- scale(scores)[,1]
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, zscore_col] <- z_scores
    
    if (CONFIG$verbose) {
      sig_name <- gsub("_Score1$", "", score_col)
      cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean %.3f -> %.3f, SD %.3f -> %.3f\n", 
                  sig_name, mean(scores, na.rm = TRUE), mean(z_scores, na.rm = TRUE), 
                  sd(scores, na.rm = TRUE), sd(z_scores, na.rm = TRUE)))
    }
  }
}

# Get sophisticated manual annotation
get_sophisticated_manual_annotation <- function(cluster_id) {
  cluster_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters == cluster_id
  
  zscore_cols <- paste0(manual_only_scores, "_zscore")
  existing_zscore_cols <- intersect(zscore_cols, colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))
  
  if (length(existing_zscore_cols) == 0) {
    return(list(
      annotation = "No manual signature data",
      confidence = 0,
      confidence_level = "None",
      method = "No data",
      evidence = "Missing z-scores",
      n_high_conf = 0,
      n_medium_conf = 0,
      all_positive_sigs = character(0)
    ))
  }
  
  cluster_zscores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[cluster_cells, existing_zscore_cols, drop = FALSE]
  mean_zscores <- apply(cluster_zscores, 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Clean signature names
  names(mean_zscores) <- gsub("_Score1_zscore$", "", names(mean_zscores))
  
  # Find signatures above different thresholds
  high_conf_sigs <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$manual_signatures$high_conf_zscore]
  medium_conf_sigs <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$manual_signatures$medium_conf_zscore]
  low_conf_sigs <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$manual_signatures$low_conf_zscore]
  
  # Determine best annotation and confidence
  if (length(high_conf_sigs) > 0) {
    best_sig <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[high_conf_sigs]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_sig]
    confidence_level <- "High"
    evidence <- paste0(best_sig, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    
    if (length(high_conf_sigs) > 1) {
      top_sigs <- high_conf_sigs[order(-mean_zscores[high_conf_sigs])][1:min(3, length(high_conf_sigs))]
      evidence <- paste0(evidence, " + others: ", paste(top_sigs[-1], collapse = ", "))
    }
    
  } else if (length(medium_conf_sigs) > 0) {
    best_sig <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[medium_conf_sigs]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_sig]
    confidence_level <- "Medium"
    evidence <- paste0(best_sig, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    
  } else if (length(low_conf_sigs) > 0) {
    best_sig <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[low_conf_sigs]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_sig]
    confidence_level <- "Low"
    evidence <- paste0(best_sig, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    
  } else {
    best_sig <- "Uncharacterized"
    best_score <- max(mean_zscores, na.rm = TRUE)
    confidence_level <- "None"
    evidence <- paste0("Max z-score: ", round(best_score, 2))
  }
  
  return(list(
    annotation = best_sig,
    confidence = best_score,
    confidence_level = confidence_level,
    method = paste("Manual signatures", confidence_level),
    evidence = evidence,
    n_high_conf = length(high_conf_sigs),
    n_medium_conf = length(medium_conf_sigs),
    all_positive_sigs = c(high_conf_sigs, medium_conf_sigs, low_conf_sigs)
  ))
}

# ==============================================================================
# METHOD 3: SOPHISTICATED HYBRID ANALYSIS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== METHOD 3: SOPHISTICATED HYBRID ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Add module scores for hybrid signatures
hybrid_score_cols <- grep("_Score1$", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
hybrid_score_pattern <- paste(names(filtered_hybrid_signatures), collapse = "|")
existing_hybrid_scores <- hybrid_score_cols[grepl(hybrid_score_pattern, hybrid_score_cols)]

if (length(existing_hybrid_scores) == 0) {
  cat("Adding module scores for hybrid signatures...\n")
  
  merged_seurat_hmm <- AddModuleScore(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    features = filtered_hybrid_signatures,
    name = names(filtered_hybrid_signatures),
    ctrl = CONFIG$manual_signatures$ctrl_size,
    seed = 42
  )
  
  cat("✓ Hybrid signature module scores added\n")
}

# CRITICAL: Create combo scores (Up - Down) - The sophisticated approach
cat("Creating sophisticated combo scores (Up - Down)...\n")

for (combo_type in combo_types) {
  up_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_Up_Score1")
  down_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_Down_Score1")
  combo_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_Combo_Score")
  
  if (up_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data) && 
      down_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[combo_col]] <- 
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[up_col]] - merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[down_col]]
    
    if (CONFIG$verbose) {
      combo_mean <- mean(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[combo_col]])
      combo_sd <- sd(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[combo_col]])
      cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean = %.3f, SD = %.3f\n", combo_col, combo_mean, combo_sd))
    }
  }
}

# Z-score normalization for combo scores
cat("Applying z-score normalization to hybrid combo scores...\n")

combo_cols <- paste0(combo_types, "_Combo_Score")
existing_combo_cols <- intersect(combo_cols, colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))

for (combo_col in existing_combo_cols) {
  zscore_col <- paste0(combo_col, "_zscore")
  scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, combo_col]
  z_scores <- scale(scores)[,1]
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, zscore_col] <- z_scores
  
  if (CONFIG$verbose) {
    combo_type <- gsub("_Combo_Score", "", combo_col)
    cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean %.3f -> %.3f, SD %.3f -> %.3f\n", 
                combo_type, mean(scores), mean(z_scores), sd(scores), sd(z_scores)))
  }
}

# Get sophisticated hybrid annotation
get_sophisticated_hybrid_annotation <- function(cluster_id) {
  cluster_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters == cluster_id
  
  zscore_cols <- paste0(existing_combo_cols, "_zscore")
  existing_zscore_cols <- intersect(zscore_cols, colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))
  
  if (length(existing_zscore_cols) == 0) {
    return(list(
      annotation = "No hybrid data",
      confidence = 0,
      confidence_level = "None",
      method = "No data",
      evidence = "Missing combo scores",
      n_strong = 0,
      n_moderate = 0,
      all_positive_hybrids = character(0),
      all_scores = numeric(0)
    ))
  }
  
  cluster_zscores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[cluster_cells, existing_zscore_cols, drop = FALSE]
  mean_zscores <- apply(cluster_zscores, 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  names(mean_zscores) <- gsub("_Combo_Score_zscore", "", names(mean_zscores))
  
  strong_hybrids <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$hybrid_signatures$strong_zscore]
  moderate_hybrids <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$hybrid_signatures$moderate_zscore]
  weak_hybrids <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$hybrid_signatures$weak_zscore]
  
  if (length(strong_hybrids) > 0) {
    best_hybrid <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[strong_hybrids]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_hybrid]
    confidence_level <- "Strong"
    
    if (length(strong_hybrids) > 1) {
      all_strong <- paste(strong_hybrids, collapse = "+")
      annotation <- paste("Multi-hybrid", all_strong)
      evidence <- paste0("Multiple strong: ", paste(paste0(strong_hybrids, "(", round(mean_zscores[strong_hybrids], 2), ")"), collapse = ", "))
    } else {
      annotation <- paste("Hybrid", best_hybrid)
      evidence <- paste0(best_hybrid, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    }
    
  } else if (length(moderate_hybrids) > 0) {
    best_hybrid <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[moderate_hybrids]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_hybrid]
    confidence_level <- "Moderate"
    annotation <- paste("Potential hybrid", best_hybrid)
    evidence <- paste0(best_hybrid, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    
  } else if (length(weak_hybrids) > 0) {
    best_hybrid <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[weak_hybrids]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_hybrid]
    confidence_level <- "Weak"
    annotation <- paste("Weak hybrid", best_hybrid)
    evidence <- paste0(best_hybrid, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    
  } else {
    best_score <- max(mean_zscores, na.rm = TRUE)
    confidence_level <- "None"
    annotation <- "No hybrid signature"
    evidence <- paste0("Max z-score: ", round(best_score, 2))
  }
  
  return(list(
    annotation = annotation,
    confidence = best_score,
    confidence_level = confidence_level,
    method = paste("Hybrid combo", confidence_level),
    evidence = evidence,
    n_strong = length(strong_hybrids),
    n_moderate = length(moderate_hybrids),
    all_positive_hybrids = c(strong_hybrids, moderate_hybrids, weak_hybrids),
    all_scores = mean_zscores
  ))
}

# ==============================================================================
# APPLY ALL THREE METHODS TO EACH CLUSTER
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== APPLYING TRIPLE ANNOTATION SYSTEM ===\n")

unique_clusters <- sort(unique(as.character(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters)))
n_clusters <- length(unique_clusters)

# Initialize comprehensive results dataframe
triple_results <- data.frame(
  cluster = unique_clusters,
  
  # FindMarkers results
  FM_annotation = character(n_clusters),
  FM_confidence = numeric(n_clusters),
  FM_bio_confidence = numeric(n_clusters),
  FM_method = character(n_clusters),
  FM_evidence = character(n_clusters),
  FM_n_markers = numeric(n_clusters),
  
  # Manual signature results
  MS_annotation = character(n_clusters),
  MS_confidence = numeric(n_clusters),
  MS_confidence_level = character(n_clusters),
  MS_method = character(n_clusters),
  MS_evidence = character(n_clusters),
  MS_n_high_conf = numeric(n_clusters),
  MS_n_medium_conf = numeric(n_clusters),
  
  # Hybrid results
  HY_annotation = character(n_clusters),
  HY_confidence = numeric(n_clusters),
  HY_confidence_level = character(n_clusters),
  HY_method = character(n_clusters),
  HY_evidence = character(n_clusters),
  HY_n_strong = numeric(n_clusters),
  HY_n_moderate = numeric(n_clusters),
  
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Process each cluster with all three methods
cat("Processing clusters with triple annotation system...\n")

for (i in seq_along(unique_clusters)) {
  cluster_id <- unique_clusters[i]
  
  if (i %% 5 == 0) cat(sprintf("Processing cluster %s (%d/%d)\n", cluster_id, i, n_clusters))
  ###CHECK THIS! WHY IS IT ONLY PROCESSING 3 CLUSTERS?
  
  # Method 1: Sophisticated FindMarkers
  fm_result <- get_sophisticated_findmarkers_annotation(cluster_id, all_markers)
  triple_results$FM_annotation[i] <- fm_result$annotation
  triple_results$FM_confidence[i] <- fm_result$confidence
  triple_results$FM_bio_confidence[i] <- fm_result$biological_confidence
  triple_results$FM_method[i] <- fm_result$method
  triple_results$FM_evidence[i] <- fm_result$evidence
  triple_results$FM_n_markers[i] <- fm_result$n_markers
  
  # Method 2: Sophisticated Manual Signatures
  ms_result <- get_sophisticated_manual_annotation(cluster_id)
  triple_results$MS_annotation[i] <- ms_result$annotation
  triple_results$MS_confidence[i] <- ms_result$confidence
  triple_results$MS_confidence_level[i] <- ms_result$confidence_level
  triple_results$MS_method[i] <- ms_result$method
  triple_results$MS_evidence[i] <- ms_result$evidence
  triple_results$MS_n_high_conf[i] <- ms_result$n_high_conf
  triple_results$MS_n_medium_conf[i] <- ms_result$n_medium_conf
  
  # Method 3: Sophisticated Hybrid Analysis
  hy_result <- get_sophisticated_hybrid_annotation(cluster_id)
  triple_results$HY_annotation[i] <- hy_result$annotation
  triple_results$HY_confidence[i] <- hy_result$confidence
  triple_results$HY_confidence_level[i] <- hy_result$confidence_level
  triple_results$HY_method[i] <- hy_result$method
  triple_results$HY_evidence[i] <- hy_result$evidence
  triple_results$HY_n_strong[i] <- hy_result$n_strong
  triple_results$HY_n_moderate[i] <- hy_result$n_moderate
}

cat("✓ Triple annotation analysis complete!\n")

# ==============================================================================
# RECONCILIATION AND FINAL ANNOTATIONS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== CREATING FINAL RECONCILED ANNOTATIONS ===\n")

# Create final reconciled annotation
create_final_reconciled_annotation <- function(fm_data, ms_data, hy_data, cluster_id) {
  
  fm_annotation <- fm_data[["FM_annotation"]]
  fm_conf_level <- case_when(
    fm_data[["FM_n_markers"]] >= 5 ~ "High",
    fm_data[["FM_n_markers"]] >= 2 ~ "Medium", 
    TRUE ~ "Low"
  )
  
  ms_annotation <- ms_data[["MS_annotation"]]
  ms_conf_level <- ms_data[["MS_confidence_level"]]
  
  hy_annotation <- hy_data[["HY_annotation"]]
  hy_conf_level <- hy_data[["HY_confidence_level"]]
  
  # Decision logic for final annotation
  
  # 1. Strong hybrid signal takes precedence
  if (hy_conf_level == "Strong") {
    return(list(
      final_annotation = hy_annotation,
      method = "Strong_hybrid_priority",
      confidence = "High",
      supporting_evidence = paste("Hybrid:", hy_data[["HY_evidence"]], "| MS:", ms_data[["MS_evidence"]])
    ))
  }
  
  # 2. Both conventional methods high confidence and compatible
  if ((fm_conf_level == "High" && ms_conf_level == "High") ||
      (fm_conf_level == "High" && ms_conf_level == "Medium" && !grepl("Uncharacterized", ms_annotation)) ||
      (ms_conf_level == "High" && fm_conf_level == "Medium" && !grepl("Uncharacterized", fm_annotation))) {
    
    # Check compatibility
    compatible <- grepl(tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z]", "", fm_annotation)), 
                       tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z]", "", ms_annotation)), fixed = TRUE) ||
                  grepl(tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z]", "", ms_annotation)), 
                       tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z]", "", fm_annotation)), fixed = TRUE)
    
    if (compatible) {
      # Use more specific annotation
      if (grepl("Uncharacterized|^Cluster", fm_annotation) && !grepl("Uncharacterized", ms_annotation)) {
        final_annotation <- ms_annotation
        method <- "Manual_more_specific"
      } else if (ms_conf_level == "High" && !grepl("General|broad", ms_annotation)) {
        final_annotation <- ms_annotation
        method <- "Manual_high_confidence"
      } else {
        final_annotation <- fm_annotation
        method <- "FindMarkers_data_driven"
      }
      
      # Add moderate hybrid if present
      if (hy_conf_level %in% c("Moderate", "Weak")) {
        final_annotation <- paste0(final_annotation, " + ", hy_annotation)
        method <- paste0(method, "_with_hybrid")
      }
      
      return(list(
        final_annotation = final_annotation,
        method = method,
        confidence = "High",
        supporting_evidence = paste("FM:", fm_data[["FM_evidence"]], "| MS:", ms_data[["MS_evidence"]])
      ))
    }
  }
  
  # 3. Single method high confidence
  if (ms_conf_level == "High" && !grepl("Uncharacterized", ms_annotation)) {
    final_annotation <- ms_annotation
    method <- "Manual_only_confident"
    conf <- "Medium"
  } else if (fm_conf_level == "High" && !grepl("Uncharacterized", fm_annotation)) {
    final_annotation <- fm_annotation
    method <- "FindMarkers_only_confident"
    conf <- "Medium"
  } else if (hy_conf_level == "Moderate") {
    final_annotation <- hy_annotation
    method <- "Moderate_hybrid_rescue"
    conf <- "Medium"
  } else {
    # 4. Best effort with available information
    if (ms_conf_level %in% c("Medium", "Low") && !grepl("Uncharacterized", ms_annotation)) {
      final_annotation <- ms_annotation
      method <- "Manual_medium_rescue"
      conf <- "Low"
    } else if (!grepl("Uncharacterized|^Cluster", fm_annotation)) {
      final_annotation <- fm_annotation
      method <- "FindMarkers_rescue"
      conf <- "Low"
    } else {
      final_annotation <- paste("Uncharacterized cluster", cluster_id)
      method <- "All_methods_insufficient"
      conf <- "None"
    }
  }
  
  # Add weak hybrid if present and not already included
  if (hy_conf_level %in% c("Moderate", "Weak") && !grepl("hybrid", final_annotation, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    final_annotation <- paste0(final_annotation, " + ", hy_annotation)
    method <- paste0(method, "_with_hybrid")
  }
  
  return(list(
    final_annotation = final_annotation,
    method = method,
    confidence = conf,
    supporting_evidence = paste("Best available evidence from", method)
  ))
}

# Apply reconciliation
cat("Applying sophisticated reconciliation...\n")

for (i in 1:nrow(triple_results)) {
  fm_data <- triple_results[i, grep("^FM_", colnames(triple_results))]
  ms_data <- triple_results[i, grep("^MS_", colnames(triple_results))]
  hy_data <- triple_results[i, grep("^HY_", colnames(triple_results))]
  
  reconciled <- create_final_reconciled_annotation(fm_data, ms_data, hy_data, triple_results$cluster[i])
  
  triple_results$Final_annotation[i] <- reconciled$final_annotation
  triple_results$Final_method[i] <- reconciled$method
  triple_results$Final_confidence[i] <- reconciled$confidence
  triple_results$Final_evidence[i] <- reconciled$supporting_evidence
}

# Clean final annotations
clean_annotation_names <- function(annotations) {
  cleaned <- annotations
  
  cleaning_rules <- list(
    c("CD4.*T.*cell", "CD4+ T cells"),
    c("CD8.*T.*cell", "CD8+ T cells"),
    c("B.*cell", "B cells"),
    c("NK.*cell", "NK cells"),
    c("Plasma.*cell", "Plasma cells"),
    c("Dendritic.*cell", "Dendritic cells"),
    c("Epithelial.*cell", "Epithelial cells"),
    c("Endothelial.*cell", "Endothelial cells")
  )
  
  for (rule in cleaning_rules) {
    pattern <- rule[1]
    replacement <- rule[2]
    cleaned <- ifelse(grepl(pattern, cleaned, ignore.case = TRUE) & 
                     !grepl("Hybrid|hybrid", cleaned), replacement, cleaned)
  }
  
  cleaned
}

triple_results$Final_annotation_clean <- clean_annotation_names(triple_results$Final_annotation)

# ==============================================================================
# ADD RESULTS TO SEURAT OBJECT
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== ADDING RESULTS TO SEURAT OBJECT ===\n")

seurat_clusters_char <- as.character(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters)
cluster_mapping <- setNames(triple_results$Final_annotation_clean, triple_results$cluster)

# Add all annotation results to Seurat object
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$FindMarkers_Sophisticated <- 
  setNames(triple_results$FM_annotation, triple_results$cluster)[seurat_clusters_char]

merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated <- 
  setNames(triple_results$MS_annotation, triple_results$cluster)[seurat_clusters_char]

merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Hybrid_Sophisticated <- 
  setNames(triple_results$HY_annotation, triple_results$cluster)[seurat_clusters_char]

merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation <- 
  cluster_mapping[seurat_clusters_char]

# Add confidence and method information
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Annotation_Method <- 
  setNames(triple_results$Final_method, triple_results$cluster)[seurat_clusters_char]

merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Annotation_Confidence <- 
  setNames(triple_results$Final_confidence, triple_results$cluster)[seurat_clusters_char]

cat("✓ All annotation results added to Seurat object\n")

# ==============================================================================
# ANALYSIS AND VISUALIZATION
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== COMPREHENSIVE ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Method-specific summaries
create_method_summary <- function(annotations, method_name) {
  counts <- table(annotations)
  data.frame(
    Cell_type = names(counts),
    Cell_count = as.numeric(counts),
    Percentage = round(as.numeric(counts) / length(annotations) * 100, 2),
    Method = method_name,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>% arrange(desc(Cell_count))
}

fm_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$FindMarkers_Sophisticated, "FindMarkers")
ms_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated, "Manual Signatures")
hy_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Hybrid_Sophisticated, "Hybrid Analysis")
final_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation, "Final Reconciled")

# Print summaries
cat("\n=== FINDMARKERS SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(fm_summary)

cat("\n=== MANUAL SIGNATURES SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(ms_summary)

cat("\n=== HYBRID SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(hy_summary)

cat("\n=== FINAL RECONCILED ANNOTATION RESULTS ===\n")
print(final_summary)

# Hybrid detection analysis
hybrid_cells <- final_summary %>% filter(grepl("Hybrid|hybrid", Cell_type))
if (nrow(hybrid_cells) > 0) {
  cat("\n=== HYBRID CELLS DETECTED ===\n")
  print(hybrid_cells)
  cat(sprintf("Total hybrid cells: %d (%.1f%%)\n", 
             sum(hybrid_cells$Cell_count), sum(hybrid_cells$Percentage)))
}

# Method effectiveness analysis
method_effectiveness <- table(triple_results$Final_method)
cat("\n=== RECONCILIATION METHOD EFFECTIVENESS ===\n")
print(method_effectiveness)

# Confidence distribution
confidence_dist <- table(triple_results$Final_confidence)
cat("\n=== FINAL ANNOTATION CONFIDENCE DISTRIBUTION ===\n")
print(confidence_dist)

# ==============================================================================
# VISUALIZATION
# ==============================================================================

if (CONFIG$save_plots && "umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
  cat("\n=== CREATING COMPREHENSIVE VISUALIZATIONS ===\n")
  
  # Method comparison plots
  p1 <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, group.by = "FindMarkers_Sophisticated", 
                reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, label.size = 3) +
    ggtitle("FindMarkers Sophisticated") +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  p2 <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, group.by = "Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated",
                reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, label.size = 3) +
    ggtitle("Manual Gene Modules Sophisticated") +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  p3 <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, group.by = "Hybrid_Sophisticated",
                reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, label.size = 3) +
    ggtitle("Hybrid Analysis Sophisticated") +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  p4 <- DimPlot(merged_seurat_hmm, group.by = "Final_Sophisticated_Annotation",
                reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, label.size = 3) +
    ggtitle("Final Reconciled Annotation") +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  # Create comparison panel
  comparison_panel <- (p1 | p2) / (p3 | p4)
  comparison_panel <- comparison_panel + plot_annotation(
    title = "Sophisticated Triple Annotation System Comparison",
    subtitle = "Independent analysis by three sophisticated methods with final reconciliation"
  )
  
  print(comparison_panel)
  ggsave("sophisticated_triple_annotation_comparison.png", 
         comparison_panel, width = 20, height = 16, dpi = 300)
  
  # Individual method plots with legends
  ggsave("findmarkers_sophisticated.png", p1 + theme(legend.position = "right"), 
         width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("manual_signatures_sophisticated.png", p2 + theme(legend.position = "right"), 
         width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("hybrid_sophisticated.png", p3 + theme(legend.position = "right"), 
         width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("final_sophisticated_annotation.png", p4 + theme(legend.position = "right"), 
         width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
  
  cat("✓ Visualizations saved\n")
}

# ==============================================================================
# SAVE RESULTS
# ==============================================================================

if (CONFIG$save_intermediate) {
  # Save comprehensive results
  write.csv(triple_results, "sophisticated_triple_annotation_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Save method summaries
  all_summaries <- rbind(fm_summary, ms_summary, hy_summary, final_summary)
  write.csv(all_summaries, "sophisticated_annotation_summaries.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Save hybrid-specific results
  if (nrow(hybrid_cells) > 0) {
    write.csv(hybrid_cells, "sophisticated_hybrid_cells_detected.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  }
  
  cat("✓ Data files saved\n")
}

# Save annotated Seurat object
saveRDS(merged_seurat_hmm, "merged_seurat_sophisticated_triple_annotated.rds")

# ==============================================================================
# DIAGNOSTIC FUNCTIONS
# ==============================================================================

# Create diagnostic functions
check_sophisticated_cluster_annotation <- function(cluster_id) {
  cat(sprintf("\n=== DETAILED ANALYSIS FOR CLUSTER %s ===\n", cluster_id))
  
  cluster_data <- triple_results[triple_results$cluster == cluster_id, ]
  
  if (nrow(cluster_data) == 0) {
    cat("Cluster not found!\n")
    return()
  }
  
  cat("FINDMARKERS ANALYSIS:\n")
  cat(sprintf("• Annotation: %s\n", cluster_data$FM_annotation))
  cat(sprintf("• Confidence: %d markers (Bio confidence: %.2f)\n", 
             cluster_data$FM_n_markers, cluster_data$FM_bio_confidence))
  cat(sprintf("• Evidence: %s\n", cluster_data$FM_evidence))
  
  cat("\nMANUAL SIGNATURES ANALYSIS:\n")
  cat(sprintf("• Annotation: %s\n", cluster_data$MS_annotation))
  cat(sprintf("• Confidence: %.2f (%s level)\n", 
             cluster_data$MS_confidence, cluster_data$MS_confidence_level))
  cat(sprintf("• High confidence signatures: %d\n", cluster_data$MS_n_high_conf))
  cat(sprintf("• Evidence: %s\n", cluster_data$MS_evidence))
  
  cat("\nHYBRID ANALYSIS:\n")
  cat(sprintf("• Annotation: %s\n", cluster_data$HY_annotation))
  cat(sprintf("• Confidence: %.2f (%s level)\n", 
             cluster_data$HY_confidence, cluster_data$HY_confidence_level))
  cat(sprintf("• Strong hybrids: %d, Moderate: %d\n", 
             cluster_data$HY_n_strong, cluster_data$HY_n_moderate))
  cat(sprintf("• Evidence: %s\n", cluster_data$HY_evidence))
  
  cat("\nFINAL RECONCILIATION:\n")
  cat(sprintf("• Final Annotation: %s\n", cluster_data$Final_annotation))
  cat(sprintf("• Method Used: %s\n", cluster_data$Final_method))
  cat(sprintf("• Confidence: %s\n", cluster_data$Final_confidence))
  cat(sprintf("• Supporting Evidence: %s\n", cluster_data$Final_evidence))
}

compare_methods_for_cluster <- function(cluster_id) {
  cat(sprintf("\n=== METHOD COMPARISON FOR CLUSTER %s ===\n", cluster_id))
  
  cluster_data <- triple_results[triple_results$cluster == cluster_id, ]
  
  if (nrow(cluster_data) == 0) {
    cat("Cluster not found!\n")
    return()
  }
  
  methods_df <- data.frame(
    Method = c("FindMarkers", "Manual Signatures", "Hybrid Analysis", "Final Reconciled"),
    Annotation = c(cluster_data$FM_annotation, cluster_data$MS_annotation, 
                  cluster_data$HY_annotation, cluster_data$Final_annotation),
    Confidence_Level = c(cluster_data$FM_method, cluster_data$MS_confidence_level,
                        cluster_data$HY_confidence_level, cluster_data$Final_confidence),
    Evidence = c(cluster_data$FM_evidence, cluster_data$MS_evidence,
                cluster_data$HY_evidence, cluster_data$Final_evidence)
  )
  
  print(methods_df)
  
  # Cell count for this cluster
  cluster_cell_count <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters == cluster_id)
  cat(sprintf("Cluster contains %d cells\n", cluster_cell_count))
}

# ==============================================================================
# FINAL SUMMARY AND RECOMMENDATIONS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n", rep("=", 80), "\n")
cat("SOPHISTICATED TRIPLE ANNOTATION SYSTEM - COMPLETE\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n")

cat("\n🎉 SUCCESS! Created sophisticated triple annotation system:\n\n")

cat("📊 METHOD COMPARISON:\n")
cat("1. FindMarkers Sophisticated:\n")
cat("   • Enhanced biological inference with confidence scoring\n")
cat("   • Multi-factor confidence assessment\n")
cat("   • Filtered ribosomal/mitochondrial genes\n")
cat("   • Downsampled large clusters for better statistics\n\n")

cat("2. Manual Signatures Sophisticated:\n")
cat("   • Z-score normalized within signature category\n")
cat("   • Threshold-based assignment (non-competitive)\n")
cat("   • Multiple confidence levels (High/Medium/Low)\n")
cat("   • Comprehensive curated signature library\n\n")

cat("3. Hybrid Analysis Sophisticated:\n")
cat("   • Combo scores (Up - Down) for biological relevance\n")
cat("   • Z-score normalized for fair comparison\n")
cat("   • Independent threshold assignment\n")
cat("   • Multi-level confidence (Strong/Moderate/Weak)\n\n")

# Calculate method statistics
total_cells <- ncol(merged_seurat_hmm)

# Uncharacterized rates by method
fm_unchar <- sum(grepl("Uncharacterized|^Cluster", merged_seurat_hmm$FindMarkers_Sophisticated))
ms_unchar <- sum(grepl("Uncharacterized", merged_seurat_hmm$Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated))
final_unchar <- sum(grepl("Uncharacterized", merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation))

cat("📈 ANNOTATION SUCCESS RATES:\n")
cat(sprintf("• FindMarkers: %d/%d cells characterized (%.1f%%)\n",
           total_cells - fm_unchar, total_cells, (total_cells - fm_unchar) / total_cells * 100))
cat(sprintf("• Manual Signatures: %d/%d cells characterized (%.1f%%)\n",
           total_cells - ms_unchar, total_cells, (total_cells - ms_unchar) / total_cells * 100))
cat(sprintf("• Final Reconciled: %d/%d cells characterized (%.1f%%)\n",
           total_cells - final_unchar, total_cells, (total_cells - final_unchar) / total_cells * 100))

# Hybrid detection summary
hybrid_positive_cells <- sum(grepl("Hybrid|hybrid", merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation))
if (hybrid_positive_cells > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("• Hybrid cells detected: %d (%.1f%%)\n", 
             hybrid_positive_cells, hybrid_positive_cells / total_cells * 100))
  
  # Break down by hybrid type
  for (combo_type in combo_types) {
    type_count <- sum(grepl(combo_type, merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation))
    if (type_count > 0) {
      cat(sprintf("  - %s: %d cells\n", combo_type, type_count))
    }
  }
}

# Method effectiveness analysis
cat("\n🔧 RECONCILIATION METHOD EFFECTIVENESS:\n")
top_methods <- head(sort(method_effectiveness, decreasing = TRUE), 3)
for (i in 1:length(top_methods)) {
  method_name <- names(top_methods)[i]
  count <- top_methods[i]
  cat(sprintf("%d. %s: %d clusters\n", i, method_name, count))
}

# Confidence distribution
high_conf <- sum(triple_results$Final_confidence == "High")
medium_conf <- sum(triple_results$Final_confidence == "Medium")
low_conf <- sum(triple_results$Final_confidence == "Low")

# COMPLETE SOPHISTICATED TRIPLE ANNOTATION SYSTEM
# =================================================
# Three independent, sophisticated annotation approaches:
# 1. FindMarkers: Data-driven differential expression
# 2. Manual Signatures: Curated knowledge-based signatures with z-score normalization
# 3. Hybrid Modules: Sophisticated combo score analysis (Up - Down genes)
#
# Each method uses appropriate normalization and threshold strategies

library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyr)
library(viridis)

cat("=== COMPLETE SOPHISTICATED TRIPLE ANNOTATION SYSTEM ===\n")

# ==============================================================================
# CONFIGURATION AND SETUP
# ==============================================================================

CONFIG <- list(
  # File paths - UPDATE TO YOUR SYSTEM
  base_path = "/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/combined_gene_modules",
  
  # FindMarkers thresholds
  findmarkers = list(
    min_pct = 0.25,
    logfc_threshold = 0.25,
    high_conf_markers = 3,
    medium_conf_markers = 1,
    max_cells_per_ident = 500
  ),
  
  # Manual signature thresholds (z-score based)
  manual_signatures = list(
    min_genes = 3,
    ctrl_size = 100,
    high_conf_zscore = 1.5,    # 1.5 SD above mean
    medium_conf_zscore = 1.0,  # 1.0 SD above mean
    low_conf_zscore = 0.5      # 0.5 SD above mean
  ),
  
  # Hybrid signature thresholds (z-score based)
  hybrid_signatures = list(
    strong_zscore = 1.0,       # 1.0 SD above mean
    moderate_zscore = 0.5,     # 0.5 SD above mean
    weak_zscore = 0.2          # 0.2 SD above mean
  ),
  
  # Analysis options
  save_plots = TRUE,
  save_intermediate = TRUE,
  verbose = TRUE,
  filter_ribosomal = TRUE,
  filter_mitochondrial = TRUE
)

# ==============================================================================
# UTILITY FUNCTIONS
# ==============================================================================

# Load hybrid modules with error handling
load_combo_module <- function(filepath, module_name) {
  if (file.exists(filepath)) {
    tryCatch({
      module_data <- read.csv(filepath, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      up_genes <- module_data$Gene[module_data$Regulation == "Up"]
      down_genes <- module_data$Gene[module_data$Regulation == "Down"]
      
      if (CONFIG$verbose) {
        cat(sprintf("%s module: Up = %d, Down = %d\n", 
                   module_name, length(up_genes), length(down_genes)))
      }
      return(list(up = up_genes, down = down_genes))
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("Error loading %s: %s\n", filepath, e$message))
      return(list(up = character(0), down = character(0)))
    })
  } else {
    if (CONFIG$verbose) cat(sprintf("WARNING: File not found: %s\n", filepath))
    return(list(up = character(0), down = character(0)))
  }
}

# Filter out problematic genes
filter_problematic_genes <- function(gene_list) {
  if (CONFIG$filter_ribosomal) {
    gene_list <- gene_list[!grepl("^RP[SL]", gene_list)]
  }
  if (CONFIG$filter_mitochondrial) {
    gene_list <- gene_list[!grepl("^MT-", gene_list)]
  }
  return(gene_list)
}

# ==============================================================================
# DATA LOADING AND SIGNATURE PREPARATION
# ==============================================================================

cat("Loading and preparing gene signatures...\n")

# Load hybrid modules
chc1_module <- load_combo_module(file.path(CONFIG$base_path, "CHC1_Combined_genes.csv"), "CHC1")
chc2_module <- load_combo_module(file.path(CONFIG$base_path, "CHC2_Combined_genes.csv"), "CHC2")
chc3_module <- load_combo_module(file.path(CONFIG$base_path, "CHC3_Combined_genes.csv"), "CHC3")
thc_module <- load_combo_module(file.path(CONFIG$base_path, "THC_Combined_genes.csv"), "THC")

# Define comprehensive manual signatures
manual_signatures <- list(
  # T cell signatures
  "CD4_T_cells" = c("CD3D", "CD3E", "CD4", "IL7R", "CCR7", "LEF1", "TCF7", "SELL", "CD28"),
  "CD8_T_cells" = c("CD3D", "CD3E", "CD8A", "CD8B", "CCL5", "GZMA", "GZMB", "PRF1", "CD27"),
  "Memory_T_cells" = c("IL7R", "CCR7", "CD45RO", "SELL", "TCF7", "LEF1", "CD44", "CD28"),
  "Naive_T_cells" = c("CCR7", "SELL", "TCF7", "LEF1", "IL7R", "CD45RA", "CD62L"),
  "Regulatory_T_cells" = c("FOXP3", "IL2RA", "CTLA4", "IKZF2", "TIGIT", "CD25", "ICOS"),
  "Exhausted_T_cells" = c("PDCD1", "CTLA4", "TIGIT", "LAG3", "HAVCR2", "TOX", "CD244"),
  
  # B cell signatures
  "B_cells" = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B", "CD19", "PAX5", "BLK", "FCRLA", "TCL1A"),
  "Naive_B_cells" = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "TCL1A", "FCRLA", "CD19", "IGHD", "CD38"),
  "Memory_B_cells" = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD27", "CD38", "IGHG1", "IGHG3"),
  "Plasma_cells" = c("IGKC", "IGLC2", "IGLC3", "XBP1", "IRF4", "PRDM1", "CD38", "CD138"),
  "Plasmablasts" = c("XBP1", "IRF4", "PRDM1", "CD38", "CD27", "IGHG1"),
  
  # Myeloid signatures
  "CD14_Monocytes" = c("CD14", "LYZ", "S100A9", "S100A8", "FCN1", "VCAN", "CD68"),
  "CD16_Monocytes" = c("FCGR3A", "MS4A7", "CDKN1C", "VMO1", "CKB", "CD16", "RHOC"),
  "Intermediate_Monocytes" = c("CD14", "FCGR3A", "CD68", "CCR2", "CX3CR1"),
  "Classical_Monocytes" = c("CD14", "CCR2", "CD68", "S100A8", "S100A9"),
  "Macrophages_M0" = c("CD68", "CD163", "MSR1", "MRC1", "CSF1R", "ADGRE1", "LYZ"),
  "M1_Macrophages" = c("CD86", "IL1B", "TNF", "CXCL10", "IL6", "NOS2", "CD80", "STAT1", "IRF1"),
  "M2_Macrophages" = c("ARG1", "IL10", "MRC1", "CD163", "TGFB1", "IL1RN", "STAT6", "MAF", "CD206"),
  "M2a_Macrophages" = c("ARG1", "IL10", "MRC1", "CD163", "IL1RN", "CLEC10A"),
  "M2b_Macrophages" = c("IL10", "IL1B", "TNF", "CD86", "FCGR2B", "SOCS3"),
  "M2c_Macrophages" = c("IL10", "TGFB1", "ARG1", "STAT3", "SOCS3"),
  "Tumor_Associated_Macrophages" = c("CD163", "CD206", "ARG1", "IL10", "VEGFA", "MMP9", "CSF1R"),
  
  # NK cells
  "NK_cells" = c("GNLY", "NKG7", "GZMA", "GZMB", "PRF1", "KLRD1", "KLRF1", "NCAM1", "CD16"),
  "NK_cells_CD56bright" = c("NCAM1", "CD56", "IL7R", "KIT", "GZMA"),
  "NK_cells_CD56dim" = c("FCGR3A", "CD16", "GZMB", "PRF1", "KLRD1"),
  
  # Dendritic cells
  "Conventional_DC1" = c("CLEC9A", "XCR1", "CADM1", "NECTIN2", "SNX22"),
  "Conventional_DC2" = c("CD1C", "FCER1A", "CST3", "CLEC10A", "HLA-DRA"),
  "Plasmacytoid_DC" = c("LILRA4", "TLR7", "ITM2C", "IRF7", "CLEC4C", "TCF4"),
  "Monocyte_derived_DC" = c("CD14", "CD68", "S100A8", "FCER1A", "CD1C"),
  
  # Granulocytes
  "Neutrophils" = c("FCGR3B", "CXCR1", "CXCR2", "S100A12", "CEACAM8", "CSF3R"),
  "Eosinophils" = c("SIGLEC8", "CCR3", "IL5RA", "CLC", "RNASE3"),
  "Basophils" = c("FCER1A", "CPA3", "TPSAB1", "HDC", "IL4"),
  
  # Stromal cells
  "CAF_Inflammatory" = c("IL6", "IL8", "CXCL1", "CXCL2", "CCL2", "PDGFRA", "FAP", "CXCL12"),
  "CAF_Myofibroblastic" = c("ACTA2", "TAGLN", "MYL9", "MYLK", "TPM2", "CNN1", "CALD1", "ACTG2"),
  "CAF_Matrix" = c("COL1A1", "COL1A2", "COL3A1", "COL5A1", "COL6A1", "FN1", "SPARC", "BGN"),
  "CAF_Contractile" = c("ACTA2", "MYH11", "TAGLN", "MYLK", "CNN1", "TPM1", "TPM2"),
  "CAF_Antigen_presenting" = c("HLA-DRA", "HLA-DRB1", "CD74", "CXCL12", "CFD"),
  "CAF_Cycling" = c("MKI67", "TOP2A", "PCNA", "CDK1", "CCNB1"),
  
  # Epithelial cells
  "Epithelial_General" = c("EPCAM", "CDH1", "KRT8", "KRT18", "KRT19", "CLDN3", "CLDN4", "OCLN"),
  "Colonocytes" = c("CDX2", "KRT20", "MUC2", "TFF3", "FABP1", "CA2", "AQP8", "CEACAM6"),
  "Goblet_cells" = c("MUC2", "TFF3", "CLCA1", "AGR2", "SPDEF", "FCGBP", "ATOH1"),
  "Enterocytes" = c("FABP1", "APOA1", "APOA4", "SI", "ALPI", "SLC26A3", "GUCA2A"),
  "Enteroendocrine_cells" = c("CHGA", "CHGB", "TPH1", "GCG", "SST", "CCK"),
  "Paneth_cells" = c("LYZ", "DEFA5", "DEFA6", "CAMP", "REG3A"),
  "Tuft_cells" = c("DCLK1", "TRPM5", "GFI1B", "IL25", "PTGS1"),
  
  # Tumor cells
  "CRC_Tumor_cells" = c("CEACAM5", "CEACAM6", "MYC", "KRAS", "REG4", "SOX9", "CDX1", "LGR5"),
  "Cancer_Stem_cells" = c("LGR5", "ASCL2", "OLFM4", "SMOC2", "CD44", "CD133", "ALDH1A1", "BMI1"),
  "Proliferative_Cancer" = c("MKI67", "PCNA", "TOP2A", "MCM2", "MCM6", "CCNA2", "CCNB1"),
  "EMT_Cancer" = c("VIM", "ZEB1", "ZEB2", "SNAI1", "SNAI2", "TWIST1", "CDH2", "FN1"),
  "Invasive_Cancer" = c("MMP1", "MMP2", "MMP9", "MMP11", "TIMP1", "PLAU", "SERPINE1"),
  
  # Endothelial and vascular
  "Endothelial_cells" = c("PECAM1", "VWF", "CDH5", "PTPRB", "FLT1", "KDR", "TEK", "CLDN5"),
  "Arterial_Endothelial" = c("GJA5", "BMX", "DKK2", "EFNB2"),
  "Venous_Endothelial" = c("NR2F2", "APLNR", "ACKR1"),
  "Lymphatic_Endothelial" = c("PROX1", "CCL21", "LYVE1", "FLT4"),
  "Pericytes" = c("PDGFRB", "ACTA2", "NG2", "RGS5", "MCAM", "NOTCH3", "CSPG4"),
  "Smooth_muscle" = c("ACTA2", "MYH11", "TAGLN", "MYLK", "CNN1", "SMTN", "ACTG2"),
  
  # Other cell types
  "Platelets" = c("PPBP", "PF4", "GNG11", "NRGN", "GP9", "TUBB1", "ITGA2B"),
  "Mast_cells" = c("TPSAB1", "CPA3", "HDC", "KIT", "FCER1A"),
  "Mesenchymal_Stem_cells" = c("THY1", "ENG", "NT5E", "ALCAM", "PDGFRA")
)

# Apply filtering to manual signatures
manual_signatures <- lapply(manual_signatures, filter_problematic_genes)

# Filter signatures by gene availability
available_genes <- rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)
filtered_manual_signatures <- lapply(manual_signatures, function(genes) {
  present_genes <- genes[genes %in% available_genes]
  if (length(present_genes) >= CONFIG$manual_signatures$min_genes) present_genes else NULL
})
filtered_manual_signatures <- filtered_manual_signatures[!sapply(filtered_manual_signatures, is.null)]

if (CONFIG$verbose) {
  cat(sprintf("Manual signatures: %d total, %d with ≥%d genes available\n", 
             length(manual_signatures), length(filtered_manual_signatures), 
             CONFIG$manual_signatures$min_genes))
}

# Create hybrid signatures (SOPHISTICATED APPROACH - YOUR PROVEN METHOD)
hybrid_signatures <- list()
combo_types <- c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")
modules <- list(chc1_module, chc2_module, chc3_module, thc_module)

for (i in seq_along(combo_types)) {
  combo_type <- combo_types[i]
  module <- modules[[i]]
  
  # Create separate Up/Down for combo calculation (CRITICAL for sophisticated method)
  if (length(module$up) > 0) {
    hybrid_signatures[[paste0(combo_type, "_Up")]] <- filter_problematic_genes(module$up)
  }
  if (length(module$down) > 0) {
    hybrid_signatures[[paste0(combo_type, "_Down")]] <- filter_problematic_genes(module$down)
  }
  
  # Also create combined signature for alternative analysis
  if (length(module$up) > 0 || length(module$down) > 0) {
    hybrid_signatures[[combo_type]] <- filter_problematic_genes(c(module$up, module$down))
  }
}

# Filter hybrid signatures by availability
filtered_hybrid_signatures <- lapply(hybrid_signatures, function(genes) {
  present_genes <- genes[genes %in% available_genes]
  if (length(present_genes) >= CONFIG$manual_signatures$min_genes) present_genes else NULL
})
filtered_hybrid_signatures <- filtered_hybrid_signatures[!sapply(filtered_hybrid_signatures, is.null)]

if (CONFIG$verbose) {
  cat(sprintf("Hybrid signatures: %d total, %d with ≥%d genes available\n", 
             length(hybrid_signatures), length(filtered_hybrid_signatures),
             CONFIG$manual_signatures$min_genes))
}

# ==============================================================================
# METHOD 1: SOPHISTICATED FINDMARKERS ANALYSIS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== METHOD 1: SOPHISTICATED FINDMARKERS ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Load or run FindMarkers
if (file.exists("sophisticated_findmarkers_results.csv")) {
  all_markers <- read.csv("sophisticated_findmarkers_results.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  all_markers$cluster <- as.character(all_markers$cluster)
  cat("Loaded existing sophisticated FindMarkers results\n")
} else {
  cat("Running sophisticated FindMarkers analysis...\n")
  
  all_markers <- FindAllMarkers(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    only.pos = TRUE,
    min.pct = CONFIG$findmarkers$min_pct,
    logfc.threshold = CONFIG$findmarkers$logfc_threshold,
    test.use = "wilcox",
    max.cells.per.ident = CONFIG$findmarkers$max_cells_per_ident,
    return.thresh = 0.01,
    verbose = CONFIG$verbose
  )
  all_markers$cluster <- as.character(all_markers$cluster)
  
  if (CONFIG$save_intermediate) {
    write.csv(all_markers, "sophisticated_findmarkers_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  }
}

# Enhanced cell type inference (FIXED)
infer_cell_type_from_markers <- function(top_genes, cluster_id) {
  markers_str <- paste(tolower(top_genes), collapse = " ")
  confidence_scores <- numeric(0)  # Initialize as numeric vector, not list
  confidence_names <- character(0)  # Store names separately
  
  # T cell family
  if (any(grepl("cd3d|cd3e|cd3g", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("cd4", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.9)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "CD4+ T cells")
    }
    if (any(grepl("cd8a|cd8b", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.9)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "CD8+ T cells")
    }
    if (any(grepl("foxp3|il2ra|ctla4", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Regulatory T cells")
    }
    if (any(grepl("il7r|ccr7|sell", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Memory T cells")
    }
    # Add general T cell if no specific subtype detected
    if (length(confidence_scores) == 0 || max(confidence_scores) < 0.8) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "T cells")
    }
  }
  
  # B cell family
  if (any(grepl("ms4a1|cd79a|cd79b|cd19", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("igkc|iglc|xbp1|prdm1", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.9)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Plasma cells")
    } else if (any(grepl("cd27|cd38", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Memory B cells")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "B cells")
    }
  }
  
  # Myeloid family
  if (any(grepl("cd14|lyz|s100a8|s100a9", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("fcgr3a", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "CD16+ Monocytes")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "CD14+ Monocytes")
    }
  }
  
  if (any(grepl("cd68|cd163|msr1|mrc1", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("arg1|il10|cd163", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "M2 Macrophages")
    } else if (any(grepl("il1b|tnf|cd86", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "M1 Macrophages")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Macrophages")
    }
  }
  
  # NK cells
  if (any(grepl("gnly|nkg7|klrd1|ncam1", markers_str))) {
    confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
    confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "NK cells")
  }
  
  # Dendritic cells
  if (any(grepl("fcer1a|clec10a|cd1c", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("lilra4|irf7", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Plasmacytoid DCs")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Dendritic cells")
    }
  }
  
  # Epithelial cells
  if (any(grepl("epcam|krt8|krt18|krt19", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("muc2|tff3|goblet", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Goblet cells")
    } else if (any(grepl("cdx2|fabp1", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Colonocytes")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Epithelial cells")
    }
  }
  
  # CAFs/Fibroblasts
  if (any(grepl("col1a1|col1a2|col3a1|pdgfra", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("acta2|tagln|mylk", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Myofibroblastic CAFs")
    } else if (any(grepl("il6|il8|cxcl", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Inflammatory CAFs")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "CAFs")
    }
  }
  
  # Endothelial
  if (any(grepl("pecam1|vwf|cdh5", markers_str))) {
    confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
    confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Endothelial cells")
  }
  
  # Tumor cells
  if (any(grepl("ceacam5|ceacam6|reg4|sox9", markers_str))) {
    if (any(grepl("ki67|pcna|top2a", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Proliferative cancer cells")
    } else if (any(grepl("lgr5|cd44|aldh1a1", markers_str))) {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Cancer stem cells")
    } else {
      confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.7)
      confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Tumor cells")
    }
  }
  
  # Other
  if (any(grepl("ppbp|pf4|gng11", markers_str))) {
    confidence_scores <- c(confidence_scores, 0.8)
    confidence_names <- c(confidence_names, "Platelets")
  }
  
  # Return best match or uncharacterized
  if (length(confidence_scores) > 0) {
    best_idx <- which.max(confidence_scores)
    best_match <- confidence_names[best_idx]
    best_confidence <- confidence_scores[best_idx]
    
    return(list(
      annotation = best_match,
      confidence = best_confidence,
      evidence = paste(top_genes[1:min(3, length(top_genes))], collapse = "+")
    ))
  } else {
    return(list(
      annotation = paste("Uncharacterized cluster", cluster_id),
      confidence = 0,
      evidence = paste(top_genes[1:min(2, length(top_genes))], collapse = "+")
    ))
  }
}

# Get sophisticated FindMarkers annotation
get_sophisticated_findmarkers_annotation <- function(cluster_id, markers_data) {
  cluster_markers <- markers_data %>%
    filter(cluster == cluster_id, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%
    arrange(p_val_adj, desc(avg_log2FC))
  
  if (nrow(cluster_markers) == 0) {
    return(list(
      annotation = paste("Cluster", cluster_id),
      confidence = 0,
      biological_confidence = 0,
      method = "No significant markers",
      evidence = "No markers found",
      n_markers = 0
    ))
  }
  
  n_sig_markers <- nrow(cluster_markers)
  top_genes <- cluster_markers$gene[1:min(10, nrow(cluster_markers))]
  
  inference_result <- infer_cell_type_from_markers(top_genes, cluster_id)
  
  marker_confidence <- case_when(
    n_sig_markers >= CONFIG$findmarkers$high_conf_markers ~ "High",
    n_sig_markers >= CONFIG$findmarkers$medium_conf_markers ~ "Medium",
    TRUE ~ "Low"
  )
  
  return(list(
    annotation = inference_result$annotation,
    confidence = n_sig_markers,
    biological_confidence = inference_result$confidence,
    method = paste("FindMarkers", marker_confidence),
    evidence = inference_result$evidence,
    n_markers = n_sig_markers
  ))
}

# ==============================================================================
# METHOD 2: SOPHISTICATED MANUAL SIGNATURE ANALYSIS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== METHOD 2: SOPHISTICATED MANUAL SIGNATURE ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Add module scores for manual signatures
score_cols <- grep("_Score1$", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
manual_score_pattern <- paste(names(filtered_manual_signatures), collapse = "|")
existing_manual_scores <- score_cols[grepl(manual_score_pattern, score_cols)]

if (length(existing_manual_scores) == 0) {
  cat("Adding module scores for manual signatures...\n")
  
  merged_seurat_hmm <- AddModuleScore(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    features = filtered_manual_signatures,
    name = names(filtered_manual_signatures),
    ctrl = CONFIG$manual_signatures$ctrl_size,
    seed = 42
  )
  
  cat("✓ Manual signature module scores added\n")
}

# Z-score normalization for manual signatures
cat("Applying z-score normalization to manual signatures...\n")

all_score_cols <- grep("_Score1$", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
all_score_names <- gsub("_Score1$", "", all_score_cols)

# Filter to only manual signatures (exclude hybrid signatures)
manual_signature_names <- names(filtered_manual_signatures)
manual_only_scores <- all_score_cols[all_score_names %in% manual_signature_names]

if (CONFIG$verbose) {
  cat(sprintf("Found %d manual signature score columns to normalize\n", length(manual_only_scores)))
}

for (score_col in manual_only_scores) {
  zscore_col <- paste0(score_col, "_zscore")
  
  if (score_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, score_col]
    z_scores <- scale(scores)[,1]
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, zscore_col] <- z_scores
    
    if (CONFIG$verbose) {
      sig_name <- gsub("_Score1$", "", score_col)
      cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean %.3f -> %.3f, SD %.3f -> %.3f\n", 
                  sig_name, mean(scores, na.rm = TRUE), mean(z_scores, na.rm = TRUE), 
                  sd(scores, na.rm = TRUE), sd(z_scores, na.rm = TRUE)))
    }
  }
}

# Get sophisticated manual annotation
get_sophisticated_manual_annotation <- function(cluster_id) {
  cluster_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters == cluster_id
  
  zscore_cols <- paste0(manual_only_scores, "_zscore")
  existing_zscore_cols <- intersect(zscore_cols, colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))
  
  if (length(existing_zscore_cols) == 0) {
    return(list(
      annotation = "No manual signature data",
      confidence = 0,
      confidence_level = "None",
      method = "No data",
      evidence = "Missing z-scores",
      n_high_conf = 0,
      n_medium_conf = 0,
      all_positive_sigs = character(0)
    ))
  }
  
  cluster_zscores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[cluster_cells, existing_zscore_cols, drop = FALSE]
  mean_zscores <- apply(cluster_zscores, 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Clean signature names
  names(mean_zscores) <- gsub("_Score1_zscore$", "", names(mean_zscores))
  
  # Find signatures above different thresholds
  high_conf_sigs <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$manual_signatures$high_conf_zscore]
  medium_conf_sigs <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$manual_signatures$medium_conf_zscore]
  low_conf_sigs <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$manual_signatures$low_conf_zscore]
  
  # Determine best annotation and confidence
  if (length(high_conf_sigs) > 0) {
    best_sig <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[high_conf_sigs]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_sig]
    confidence_level <- "High"
    evidence <- paste0(best_sig, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    
    if (length(high_conf_sigs) > 1) {
      top_sigs <- high_conf_sigs[order(-mean_zscores[high_conf_sigs])][1:min(3, length(high_conf_sigs))]
      evidence <- paste0(evidence, " + others: ", paste(top_sigs[-1], collapse = ", "))
    }
    
  } else if (length(medium_conf_sigs) > 0) {
    best_sig <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[medium_conf_sigs]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_sig]
    confidence_level <- "Medium"
    evidence <- paste0(best_sig, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    
  } else if (length(low_conf_sigs) > 0) {
    best_sig <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[low_conf_sigs]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_sig]
    confidence_level <- "Low"
    evidence <- paste0(best_sig, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    
  } else {
    best_sig <- "Uncharacterized"
    best_score <- max(mean_zscores, na.rm = TRUE)
    confidence_level <- "None"
    evidence <- paste0("Max z-score: ", round(best_score, 2))
  }
  
  return(list(
    annotation = best_sig,
    confidence = best_score,
    confidence_level = confidence_level,
    method = paste("Manual signatures", confidence_level),
    evidence = evidence,
    n_high_conf = length(high_conf_sigs),
    n_medium_conf = length(medium_conf_sigs),
    all_positive_sigs = c(high_conf_sigs, medium_conf_sigs, low_conf_sigs)
  ))
}

# ==============================================================================
# METHOD 3: SOPHISTICATED HYBRID ANALYSIS (YOUR PROVEN APPROACH)
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== METHOD 3: SOPHISTICATED HYBRID ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Add module scores for hybrid signatures
hybrid_score_cols <- grep("_Score1$", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
hybrid_score_pattern <- paste(names(filtered_hybrid_signatures), collapse = "|")
existing_hybrid_scores <- hybrid_score_cols[grepl(hybrid_score_pattern, hybrid_score_cols)]

if (length(existing_hybrid_scores) == 0) {
  cat("Adding module scores for hybrid signatures...\n")
  
  merged_seurat_hmm <- AddModuleScore(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    features = filtered_hybrid_signatures,
    name = names(filtered_hybrid_signatures),
    ctrl = CONFIG$manual_signatures$ctrl_size,
    seed = 42
  )
  
  cat("✓ Hybrid signature module scores added\n")
}

# CRITICAL: Create combo scores (Up - Down) - The sophisticated approach
cat("Creating sophisticated combo scores (Up - Down)...\n")

for (combo_type in combo_types) {
  up_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_Up_Score1")
  down_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_Down_Score1")
  combo_col <- paste0(combo_type, "_Combo_Score")
  
  if (up_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data) && 
      down_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[combo_col]] <- 
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[up_col]] - merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[down_col]]
    
    if (CONFIG$verbose) {
      combo_mean <- mean(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[combo_col]])
      combo_sd <- sd(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[combo_col]])
      cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean = %.3f, SD = %.3f\n", combo_col, combo_mean, combo_sd))
    }
  }
}

# Z-score normalization for combo scores
cat("Applying z-score normalization to hybrid combo scores...\n")

combo_cols <- paste0(combo_types, "_Combo_Score")
existing_combo_cols <- intersect(combo_cols, colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))

for (combo_col in existing_combo_cols) {
  zscore_col <- paste0(combo_col, "_zscore")
  scores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, combo_col]
  z_scores <- scale(scores)[,1]
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, zscore_col] <- z_scores
  
  if (CONFIG$verbose) {
    combo_type <- gsub("_Combo_Score", "", combo_col)
    cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean %.3f -> %.3f, SD %.3f -> %.3f\n", 
                combo_type, mean(scores), mean(z_scores), sd(scores), sd(z_scores)))
  }
}

# Get sophisticated hybrid annotation
get_sophisticated_hybrid_annotation <- function(cluster_id) {
  cluster_cells <- merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters == cluster_id
```
