```{r}
  zscore_cols <- paste0(existing_combo_cols, "_zscore")
  existing_zscore_cols <- intersect(zscore_cols, colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))
  
  if (length(existing_zscore_cols) == 0) {
    return(list(
      annotation = "No hybrid data",
      confidence = 0,
      confidence_level = "None",
      method = "No data",
      evidence = "Missing combo scores",
      n_strong = 0,
      n_moderate = 0,
      all_positive_hybrids = character(0),
      all_scores = numeric(0)
    ))
  }
  
  cluster_zscores <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[cluster_cells, existing_zscore_cols, drop = FALSE]
  mean_zscores <- apply(cluster_zscores, 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  names(mean_zscores) <- gsub("_Combo_Score_zscore", "", names(mean_zscores))
  
  strong_hybrids <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$hybrid_signatures$strong_zscore]
  moderate_hybrids <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$hybrid_signatures$moderate_zscore]
  weak_hybrids <- names(mean_zscores)[mean_zscores >= CONFIG$hybrid_signatures$weak_zscore]
  
  if (length(strong_hybrids) > 0) {
    best_hybrid <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[strong_hybrids]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_hybrid]
    confidence_level <- "Strong"
    
    if (length(strong_hybrids) > 1) {
      all_strong <- paste(strong_hybrids, collapse = "+")
      annotation <- paste("Multi-hybrid", all_strong)
      evidence <- paste0("Multiple strong: ", paste(paste0(strong_hybrids, "(", round(mean_zscores[strong_hybrids], 2), ")"), collapse = ", "))
    } else {
      annotation <- paste("Hybrid", best_hybrid)
      evidence <- paste0(best_hybrid, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    }
    
  } else if (length(moderate_hybrids) > 0) {
    best_hybrid <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[moderate_hybrids]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_hybrid]
    confidence_level <- "Moderate"
    annotation <- paste("Potential hybrid", best_hybrid)
    evidence <- paste0(best_hybrid, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    
  } else if (length(weak_hybrids) > 0) {
    best_hybrid <- names(which.max(mean_zscores[weak_hybrids]))
    best_score <- mean_zscores[best_hybrid]
    confidence_level <- "Weak"
    annotation <- paste("Weak hybrid", best_hybrid)
    evidence <- paste0(best_hybrid, " (z=", round(best_score, 2), ")")
    
  } else {
    best_score <- max(mean_zscores, na.rm = TRUE)
    confidence_level <- "None"
    annotation <- "No hybrid signature"
    evidence <- paste0("Max z-score: ", round(best_score, 2))
  }
  
  return(list(
    annotation = annotation,
    confidence = best_score,
    confidence_level = confidence_level,
    method = paste("Hybrid combo", confidence_level),
    evidence = evidence,
    n_strong = length(strong_hybrids),
    n_moderate = length(moderate_hybrids),
    all_positive_hybrids = c(strong_hybrids, moderate_hybrids, weak_hybrids),
    all_scores = mean_zscores
  ))
}

# ==============================================================================
# APPLY ALL THREE METHODS TO EACH CLUSTER
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== APPLYING TRIPLE ANNOTATION SYSTEM ===\n")

unique_clusters <- sort(unique(as.character(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters)))
n_clusters <- length(unique_clusters)

# Initialize comprehensive results dataframe
triple_results <- data.frame(
  cluster = unique_clusters,
  
  # FindMarkers results
  FM_annotation = character(n_clusters),
  FM_confidence = numeric(n_clusters),
  FM_bio_confidence = numeric(n_clusters),
  FM_method = character(n_clusters),
  FM_evidence = character(n_clusters),
  FM_n_markers = numeric(n_clusters),
  
  # Manual signature results
  MS_annotation = character(n_clusters),
  MS_confidence = numeric(n_clusters),
  MS_confidence_level = character(n_clusters),
  MS_method = character(n_clusters),
  MS_evidence = character(n_clusters),
  MS_n_high_conf = numeric(n_clusters),
  MS_n_medium_conf = numeric(n_clusters),
  
  # Hybrid results
  HY_annotation = character(n_clusters),
  HY_confidence = numeric(n_clusters),
  HY_confidence_level = character(n_clusters),
  HY_method = character(n_clusters),
  HY_evidence = character(n_clusters),
  HY_n_strong = numeric(n_clusters),
  HY_n_moderate = numeric(n_clusters),
  
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Process each cluster with all three methods
cat("Processing clusters with triple annotation system...\n")

for (i in seq_along(unique_clusters)) {
  cluster_id <- unique_clusters[i]
  
  if (i %% 5 == 0) cat(sprintf("Processing cluster %s (%d/%d)\n", cluster_id, i, n_clusters))
  
  # Method 1: Sophisticated FindMarkers
  fm_result <- get_sophisticated_findmarkers_annotation(cluster_id, all_markers)
  triple_results$FM_annotation[i] <- fm_result$annotation
  triple_results$FM_confidence[i] <- fm_result$confidence
  triple_results$FM_bio_confidence[i] <- fm_result$biological_confidence
  triple_results$FM_method[i] <- fm_result$method
  triple_results$FM_evidence[i] <- fm_result$evidence
  triple_results$FM_n_markers[i] <- fm_result$n_markers
  
  # Method 2: Sophisticated Manual Signatures
  ms_result <- get_sophisticated_manual_annotation(cluster_id)
  triple_results$MS_annotation[i] <- ms_result$annotation
  triple_results$MS_confidence[i] <- ms_result$confidence
  triple_results$MS_confidence_level[i] <- ms_result$confidence_level
  triple_results$MS_method[i] <- ms_result$method
  triple_results$MS_evidence[i] <- ms_result$evidence
  triple_results$MS_n_high_conf[i] <- ms_result$n_high_conf
  triple_results$MS_n_medium_conf[i] <- ms_result$n_medium_conf
  
  # Method 3: Sophisticated Hybrid Analysis
  hy_result <- get_sophisticated_hybrid_annotation(cluster_id)
  triple_results$HY_annotation[i] <- hy_result$annotation
  triple_results$HY_confidence[i] <- hy_result$confidence
  triple_results$HY_confidence_level[i] <- hy_result$confidence_level
  triple_results$HY_method[i] <- hy_result$method
  triple_results$HY_evidence[i] <- hy_result$evidence
  triple_results$HY_n_strong[i] <- hy_result$n_strong
  triple_results$HY_n_moderate[i] <- hy_result$n_moderate
}

cat("✓ Triple annotation analysis complete!\n")

# ==============================================================================
# RECONCILIATION AND FINAL ANNOTATIONS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== CREATING FINAL RECONCILED ANNOTATIONS ===\n")

# Create final reconciled annotation
create_final_reconciled_annotation <- function(fm_data, ms_data, hy_data, cluster_id) {
  
  fm_annotation <- fm_data[["FM_annotation"]]
  fm_conf_level <- case_when(
    fm_data[["FM_n_markers"]] >= 5 ~ "High",
    fm_data[["FM_n_markers"]] >= 2 ~ "Medium", 
    TRUE ~ "Low"
  )
  
  ms_annotation <- ms_data[["MS_annotation"]]
  ms_conf_level <- ms_data[["MS_confidence_level"]]
  
  hy_annotation <- hy_data[["HY_annotation"]]
  hy_conf_level <- hy_data[["HY_confidence_level"]]
  
  # Decision logic for final annotation
  
  # 1. Strong hybrid signal takes precedence
  if (hy_conf_level == "Strong") {
    return(list(
      final_annotation = hy_annotation,
      method = "Strong_hybrid_priority",
      confidence = "High",
      supporting_evidence = paste("Hybrid:", hy_data[["HY_evidence"]], "| MS:", ms_data[["MS_evidence"]])
    ))
  }
  
  # 2. Both conventional methods high confidence and compatible
  if ((fm_conf_level == "High" && ms_conf_level == "High") ||
      (fm_conf_level == "High" && ms_conf_level == "Medium" && !grepl("Uncharacterized", ms_annotation)) ||
      (ms_conf_level == "High" && fm_conf_level == "Medium" && !grepl("Uncharacterized", fm_annotation))) {
    
    # Check compatibility
    compatible <- grepl(tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z]", "", fm_annotation)), 
                       tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z]", "", ms_annotation)), fixed = TRUE) ||
                  grepl(tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z]", "", ms_annotation)), 
                       tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z]", "", fm_annotation)), fixed = TRUE)
    
    if (compatible) {
      # Use more specific annotation
      if (grepl("Uncharacterized|^Cluster", fm_annotation) && !grepl("Uncharacterized", ms_annotation)) {
        final_annotation <- ms_annotation
        method <- "Manual_more_specific"
      } else if (ms_conf_level == "High" && !grepl("General|broad", ms_annotation)) {
        final_annotation <- ms_annotation
        method <- "Manual_high_confidence"
      } else {
        final_annotation <- fm_annotation
        method <- "FindMarkers_data_driven"
      }
      
      # Add moderate hybrid if present
      if (hy_conf_level %in% c("Moderate", "Weak")) {
        final_annotation <- paste0(final_annotation, " + ", hy_annotation)
        method <- paste0(method, "_with_hybrid")
      }
      
      return(list(
        final_annotation = final_annotation,
        method = method,
        confidence = "High",
        supporting_evidence = paste("FM:", fm_data[["FM_evidence"]], "| MS:", ms_data[["MS_evidence"]])
      ))
    }
  }
  
  # 3. Single method high confidence
  if (ms_conf_level == "High" && !grepl("Uncharacterized", ms_annotation)) {
    final_annotation <- ms_annotation
    method <- "Manual_only_confident"
    conf <- "Medium"
  } else if (fm_conf_level == "High" && !grepl("Uncharacterized", fm_annotation)) {
    final_annotation <- fm_annotation
    method <- "FindMarkers_only_confident"
    conf <- "Medium"
  } else if (hy_conf_level == "Moderate") {
    final_annotation <- hy_annotation
    method <- "Moderate_hybrid_rescue"
    conf <- "Medium"
  } else {
    # 4. Best effort with available information
    if (ms_conf_level %in% c("Medium", "Low") && !grepl("Uncharacterized", ms_annotation)) {
      final_annotation <- ms_annotation
      method <- "Manual_medium_rescue"
      conf <- "Low"
    } else if (!grepl("Uncharacterized|^Cluster", fm_annotation)) {
      final_annotation <- fm_annotation
      method <- "FindMarkers_rescue"
      conf <- "Low"
    } else {
      final_annotation <- paste("Uncharacterized cluster", cluster_id)
      method <- "All_methods_insufficient"
      conf <- "None"
    }
  }
  
  # Add weak hybrid if present and not already included
  if (hy_conf_level %in% c("Moderate", "Weak") && !grepl("hybrid", final_annotation, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    final_annotation <- paste0(final_annotation, " + ", hy_annotation)
    method <- paste0(method, "_with_hybrid")
  }
  
  return(list(
    final_annotation = final_annotation,
    method = method,
    confidence = conf,
    supporting_evidence = paste("Best available evidence from", method)
  ))
}

# Apply reconciliation
cat("Applying sophisticated reconciliation...\n")

for (i in 1:nrow(triple_results)) {
  fm_data <- triple_results[i, grep("^FM_", colnames(triple_results))]
  ms_data <- triple_results[i, grep("^MS_", colnames(triple_results))]
  hy_data <- triple_results[i, grep("^HY_", colnames(triple_results))]
  
  reconciled <- create_final_reconciled_annotation(fm_data, ms_data, hy_data, triple_results$cluster[i])
  
  triple_results$Final_annotation[i] <- reconciled$final_annotation
  triple_results$Final_method[i] <- reconciled$method
  triple_results$Final_confidence[i] <- reconciled$confidence
  triple_results$Final_evidence[i] <- reconciled$supporting_evidence
}

# Clean final annotations
clean_annotation_names <- function(annotations) {
  cleaned <- annotations
  
  cleaning_rules <- list(
    c("CD4.*T.*cell", "CD4+ T cells"),
    c("CD8.*T.*cell", "CD8+ T cells"),
    c("B.*cell", "B cells"),
    c("NK.*cell", "NK cells"),
    c("Plasma.*cell", "Plasma cells"),
    c("Dendritic.*cell", "Dendritic cells"),
    c("Epithelial.*cell", "Epithelial cells"),
    c("Endothelial.*cell", "Endothelial cells")
  )
  
  for (rule in cleaning_rules) {
    pattern <- rule[1]
    replacement <- rule[2]
    cleaned <- ifelse(grepl(pattern, cleaned, ignore.case = TRUE) & 
                     !grepl("Hybrid|hybrid", cleaned), replacement, cleaned)
  }
  
  cleaned
}

triple_results$Final_annotation_clean <- clean_annotation_names(triple_results$Final_annotation)

# ==============================================================================
# ADD RESULTS TO SEURAT OBJECT
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== ADDING RESULTS TO SEURAT OBJECT ===\n")

seurat_clusters_char <- as.character(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters)
cluster_mapping <- setNames(triple_results$Final_annotation_clean, triple_results$cluster)

# Add all annotation results to Seurat object
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$FindMarkers_Sophisticated <- 
  setNames(triple_results$FM_annotation, triple_results$cluster)[seurat_clusters_char]

merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated <- 
  setNames(triple_results$MS_annotation, triple_results$cluster)[seurat_clusters_char]

merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Hybrid_Sophisticated <- 
  setNames(triple_results$HY_annotation, triple_results$cluster)[seurat_clusters_char]

merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation <- 
  cluster_mapping[seurat_clusters_char]

# Add confidence and method information
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Annotation_Method <- 
  setNames(triple_results$Final_method, triple_results$cluster)[seurat_clusters_char]

merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Annotation_Confidence <- 
  setNames(triple_results$Final_confidence, triple_results$cluster)[seurat_clusters_char]

cat("✓ All annotation results added to Seurat object\n")

# ==============================================================================
# ANALYSIS AND VISUALIZATION
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== COMPREHENSIVE ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Method-specific summaries
create_method_summary <- function(annotations, method_name) {
  counts <- table(annotations)
  data.frame(
    Cell_type = names(counts),
    Cell_count = as.numeric(counts),
    Percentage = round(as.numeric(counts) / length(annotations) * 100, 2),
    Method = method_name,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>% arrange(desc(Cell_count))
}

fm_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$FindMarkers_Sophisticated, "FindMarkers")
ms_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated, "Manual Signatures")
hy_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Hybrid_Sophisticated, "Hybrid Analysis")
final_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation, "Final Reconciled")

# Print summaries
cat("\n=== FINDMARKERS SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(fm_summary)

cat("\n=== MANUAL SIGNATURES SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(ms_summary)

cat("\n=== HYBRID SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(hy_summary)

cat("\n=== FINAL RECONCILED ANNOTATION RESULTS ===\n")
print(final_summary)

# Hybrid detection analysis
hybrid_cells <- final_summary %>% filter(grepl("Hybrid|hybrid", Cell_type))
if (nrow(hybrid_cells) > 0) {
  cat("\n=== HYBRID CELLS DETECTED ===\n")
  print(hybrid_cells)
  cat(sprintf("Total hybrid cells: %d (%.1f%%)\n", 
             sum(hybrid_cells$Cell_count), sum(hybrid_cells$Percentage)))
}

# Method effectiveness analysis
method_effectiveness <- table(triple_results$Final_method)
cat("\n=== RECONCILIATION METHOD EFFECTIVENESS ===\n")
print(method_effectiveness)

# Confidence distribution
confidence_dist <- table(triple_results$Final_confidence)
cat("\n=== FINAL ANNOTATION CONFIDENCE DISTRIBUTION ===\n")
print(confidence_dist)

# ==============================================================================
# ANALYSIS AND VISUALIZATION
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== COMPREHENSIVE ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Method-specific summaries
create_method_summary <- function(annotations, method_name) {
  counts <- table(annotations)
  data.frame(
    Cell_type = names(counts),
    Cell_count = as.numeric(counts),
    Percentage = round(as.numeric(counts) / length(annotations) * 100, 2),
    Method = method_name,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>% arrange(desc(Cell_count))
}

fm_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$FindMarkers_Sophisticated, "FindMarkers")
ms_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated, "Manual Signatures")
hy_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Hybrid_Sophisticated, "Hybrid Analysis")
final_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation, "Final Reconciled")

# Print summaries
cat("\n=== FINDMARKERS SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(fm_summary)

cat("\n=== MANUAL SIGNATURES SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(ms_summary)

cat("\n=== HYBRID SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(hy_summary)

cat("\n=== FINAL RECONCILED ANNOTATION RESULTS ===\n")
print(final_summary)

# Hybrid detection analysis
hybrid_cells <- final_summary %>% filter(grepl("Hybrid|hybrid", Cell_type))
if (nrow(hybrid_cells) > 0) {
  cat("\n=== HYBRID CELLS DETECTED ===\n")
  print(hybrid_cells)
  cat(sprintf("Total hybrid cells: %d (%.1f%%)\n", 
             sum(hybrid_cells$Cell_count), sum(hybrid_cells$Percentage)))
}

# Method effectiveness analysis
method_effectiveness <- table(triple_results$Final_method)
cat("\n=== RECONCILIATION METHOD EFFECTIVENESS ===\n")
print(method_effectiveness)

# Confidence distribution
confidence_dist <- table(triple_results$Final_confidence)
cat("\n=== FINAL ANNOTATION CONFIDENCE DISTRIBUTION ===\n")
print(confidence_dist)
```
# 250730: Panel K
```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# ENHANCED VISUALIZATION WITH CUSTOM STYLING
# ==============================================================================

if (CONFIG$save_plots && "umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
  cat("\n=== CREATING ENHANCED VISUALIZATIONS ===\n")
  
  # Define custom color palette
  custom_colors <- c(
    # Hybrid signatures (your specified colors)
    "THC" = "red3",
    "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
    "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
    #"CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
    "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
    
    # Cell types (your specified colors)
    "Epithelial cells" = "gray45",
    "Epithelial General" = "gray45",
    "Colonocytes" = "gray45",
    "Goblet cells" = "gray45",
    "Monocytes" = "cadetblue3",
    "CD14+ Monocytes" = "cadetblue3",
    "CD16+ Monocytes" = "cadetblue3",
    "NK cells" = "orange",
    "CAFs" = "purple",
    "CAF Inflammatory" = "purple",
    "CAF Myofibroblastic" = "purple",
    "CAF Matrix" = "purple",
    "B cells" = "palegreen3",
    
    # Hybrid combinations (use color of first cell type)
    "Hybrid THC" = "red3",
    "Hybrid CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
    "Hybrid CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
    #"Hybrid CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
    "Hybrid CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
    "Potential hybrid THC" = "red3",
    "Potential hybrid CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
    "Potential hybrid CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
    #"Potential hybrid CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
    "Potential hybrid CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
    
    # Additional good colors for remaining cell types
    "T cells" = "dodgerblue2",
    "CD4+ T cells" = "dodgerblue2",
    "CD8+ T cells" = "royalblue4",
    "Memory T cells" = "lightblue3",
    "Regulatory T cells" = "navy",
    "Macrophages" = "cadetblue3",
    "M1 Macrophages" = "cadetblue3",
    "M2 Macrophages" = "cadetblue3",
    "Dendritic cells" = "darkorange2",
    "Plasmacytoid DCs" = "orange3",
    "Plasma cells" = "springgreen4",
    "Endothelial cells" = "hotpink3",
    "Tumor cells" = "darkred",
    "Cancer stem cells" = "maroon",
    "Platelets" = "gold2",
    "Uncharacterized" = "lightgray",
    
    # Additional colors for any remaining annotations
    "Other1" = "mediumpurple",
    "Other2" = "darkolivegreen",
    "Other3" = "chocolate3",
    "Other4" = "deepskyblue",
    "Other5" = "indianred",
    "Other6" = "forestgreen"
  )
  
  # Function to clean annotation names (replace _ with spaces)
  clean_annotation_names_for_display <- function(annotations) {
    cleaned <- gsub("_", " ", annotations)
    # Fix specific cases
    cleaned <- gsub("cells cells", "cells", cleaned)
    cleaned <- gsub("General cells", "cells", cleaned)
    return(cleaned)
  }
  
  # Function to get colors for annotations, with fallback
  get_annotation_colors <- function(annotations) {
    cleaned_annotations <- clean_annotation_names_for_display(annotations)
    unique_annotations <- unique(cleaned_annotations)
    
    # Create color mapping
    color_mapping <- character(length(unique_annotations))
    names(color_mapping) <- unique_annotations
    
    for (annotation in unique_annotations) {
      # Try exact match first
      if (annotation %in% names(custom_colors)) {
        color_mapping[annotation] <- custom_colors[annotation]
      }
      # Try partial matches for hybrid annotations
      else if (grepl("Hybrid|hybrid", annotation)) {
        if (grepl("THC", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- custom_colors["THC"]
        } else if (grepl("CHC1", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- custom_colors["CHC1"]
        } else if (grepl("CHC2", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- custom_colors["CHC2"]
        } else if (grepl("CHC3", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- custom_colors["CHC3"]
        } else {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- "red"  # Default for other hybrids
        }
      }
      # Try partial matches for cell types
      else if (grepl("Epithelial|epithelial|Colonocyte|Goblet", annotation)) {
        color_mapping[annotation] <- custom_colors["Epithelial cells"]
      } else if (grepl("Monocyte", annotation)) {
        color_mapping[annotation] <- custom_colors["Monocytes"]
      } else if (grepl("NK", annotation)) {
        color_mapping[annotation] <- custom_colors["NK cells"]
      } else if (grepl("CAF|Fibroblast", annotation)) {
        color_mapping[annotation] <- custom_colors["CAFs"]
      } else if (grepl("B cell|B-cell", annotation)) {
        color_mapping[annotation] <- custom_colors["B cells"]
      }
      # Use predefined colors or assign from remaining colors
      else {
        remaining_colors <- setdiff(custom_colors, color_mapping)
        if (length(remaining_colors) > 0) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- remaining_colors[1]
        } else {
          # Generate a random color if we run out
          color_mapping[annotation] <- rainbow(1, start = runif(1))
        }
      }
    }
    
    return(color_mapping)
  }
  
  # Create enhanced plotting function
  create_enhanced_dimplot <- function(object, group_by, plot_title, custom_colors = NULL) {
    # Clean annotation names for display
    temp_annotations <- clean_annotation_names_for_display(object@meta.data[[group_by]])
    object@meta.data[[paste0(group_by, "_clean")]] <- temp_annotations
    
    # Get appropriate colors
    if (is.null(custom_colors)) {
      plot_colors <- get_annotation_colors(temp_annotations)
    } else {
      plot_colors <- custom_colors
    }
    
    # Create the plot with enhanced styling
    p <- DimPlot(object, 
                 group.by = paste0(group_by, "_clean"),
                 reduction = "umap", 
                 label = TRUE, 
                 repel = TRUE, 
                 label.size = 6,          # Your specified font size
                 cols = plot_colors,
                 pt.size = 0.5) +
      ggtitle(plot_title) +
      theme_void() +                     # Remove all axis elements
      theme(
        aspect.ratio = 1,                # Your specified aspect ratio
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),  # Font size 6
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),               # Font size 6
        legend.title = element_text(size = 6),              # Font size 6
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"),
        plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5, "pt")
      ) +
      guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2), ncol = 1))
    
    # Clean up temporary column
    object@meta.data[[paste0(group_by, "_clean")]] <- NULL
    
    return(p)
  }
  
  # Alternative function with manual label positioning for better control
  create_enhanced_dimplot_with_arrows <- function(object, group_by, plot_title, custom_colors = NULL) {
    # Clean annotation names for display
    temp_annotations <- clean_annotation_names_for_display(object@meta.data[[group_by]])
    object@meta.data[[paste0(group_by, "_clean")]] <- temp_annotations
    
    # Get appropriate colors
    if (is.null(custom_colors)) {
      plot_colors <- get_annotation_colors(temp_annotations)
    } else {
      plot_colors <- custom_colors
    }
    
    # Create base plot without labels first
    p <- DimPlot(object, 
                 group.by = paste0(group_by, "_clean"),
                 reduction = "umap", 
                 label = FALSE,           # Turn off default labels
                 cols = plot_colors,
                 pt.size = 0.5) +
      ggtitle(plot_title) +
      theme_void() +
      theme(
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"),
        plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5, "pt")
      ) +
      guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2), ncol = 1))
    
    # Get UMAP coordinates and calculate cluster centers for labels
    umap_coords <- object@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings
    clusters <- object@meta.data[[paste0(group_by, "_clean")]]
    
    # Calculate cluster centers
    cluster_centers <- data.frame()
    for (cluster in unique(clusters)) {
      cluster_cells <- which(clusters == cluster)
      if (length(cluster_cells) > 0) {
        center_x <- median(umap_coords[cluster_cells, 1])
        center_y <- median(umap_coords[cluster_cells, 2])
        cluster_centers <- rbind(cluster_centers, data.frame(
          cluster = cluster,
          x = center_x,
          y = center_y
        ))
      }
    }
    
    # Add labels with ggrepel for better positioning
    if (nrow(cluster_centers) > 0) {
      p <- p + ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
        data = cluster_centers,
        aes(x = x, y = y, label = cluster),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        size = 6/ggplot2::.pt,
        max.overlaps = Inf,           # Show all labels
        min.segment.length = 0,
        segment.size = 0.25,
        segment.color = "black",
        box.padding = 0.3,
        point.padding = 0.3,
        force = 2,
        seed = 42
      )
    }
    
    # Clean up temporary column
    object@meta.data[[paste0(group_by, "_clean")]] <- NULL
    
    return(p)
  }
  
  # Method comparison plots with enhanced styling
  # Try the simple approach first (uses Seurat's built-in label repelling)
  p1 <- create_enhanced_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "FindMarkers_Sophisticated", 
                               "FindMarkers Sophisticated")
  
  p2 <- create_enhanced_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated",
                               "Manual Signatures Sophisticated")
  
  p3 <- create_enhanced_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "Hybrid_Sophisticated",
                               "Hybrid Analysis Sophisticated")
  
  p4 <- create_enhanced_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "Final_Sophisticated_Annotation",
                               "Final Reconciled Annotation")
  
  # If you want better label control with arrows, uncomment these lines instead:
  # p1 <- create_enhanced_dimplot_with_arrows(merged_seurat_hmm, "FindMarkers_Sophisticated", 
  #                                          "FindMarkers Sophisticated")
  # 
  # p2 <- create_enhanced_dimplot_with_arrows(merged_seurat_hmm, "Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated",
  #                                          "Manual Signatures Sophisticated")
  # 
  # p3 <- create_enhanced_dimplot_with_arrows(merged_seurat_hmm, "Hybrid_Sophisticated",
  #                                          "Hybrid Analysis Sophisticated")
  # 
  # p4 <- create_enhanced_dimplot_with_arrows(merged_seurat_hmm, "Final_Sophisticated_Annotation",
  #                                          "Final Reconciled Annotation")
  
  # Create comparison panel with enhanced layout
  comparison_panel <- (p1 | p2) / (p3 | p4)
  comparison_panel <- comparison_panel + plot_annotation(
    title = "Sophisticated Triple Annotation System",
    subtitle = "Independent analysis by three methods with final reconciliation",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5)
    )
  )
  
  # Display the plot
  print(comparison_panel)
  
  # Save plots with multiple format options
  ggsave("sophisticated_triple_annotation_comparison.png", 
         comparison_panel, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  
  # Save individual plots
  ggsave("findmarkers_sophisticated.png", p1, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("manual_signatures_sophisticated.png", p2, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("hybrid_sophisticated.png", p3, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("final_sophisticated_annotation.png", p4, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  
  # OPTIONAL: Save as PDF to specific directory (COMMENTED OUT)
  # Uncomment the lines below to save to your specified directory
  # 
  # # Create directory if it doesn't exist
  # if (!dir.exists("250725.Fig7Final")) {
  #   dir.create("250725.Fig7Final", recursive = TRUE)
  # }
  # 
  # # Save the comparison panel as PDF
  # ggsave("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelK.SophAnnots.pdf", 
  #        comparison_panel, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300, device = "pdf")
  # 
  # # Save individual plots as PDFs
  # ggsave("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelK.FindMarkers.pdf", p1, 
  #        width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300, device = "pdf")
  # ggsave("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelK.Manual.pdf", p2, 
  #        width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300, device = "pdf")
  # ggsave("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelK.Hybrid.pdf", p3, 
  #        width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300, device = "pdf")
  # ggsave("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelK.Final.pdf", p4, 
  #        width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300, device = "pdf")
  
  cat("✓ Enhanced visualizations created and saved\n")
  cat("✓ Custom colors applied for hybrid signatures and cell types\n")
  cat("✓ Annotations cleaned (underscores replaced with spaces)\n")
  cat("✓ max.overlaps increased to show more labels\n")
  cat("✓ Aspect ratio set to 1, font size set to 6\n")
  cat("✓ Axes and tick marks removed\n")
}


# ==============================================================================
# SAVE RESULTS
# ==============================================================================

if (CONFIG$save_intermediate) {
  # Save comprehensive results
  write.csv(triple_results, "sophisticated_triple_annotation_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Save method summaries
  all_summaries <- rbind(fm_summary, ms_summary, hy_summary, final_summary)
  write.csv(all_summaries, "sophisticated_annotation_summaries.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Save hybrid-specific results
  if (nrow(hybrid_cells) > 0) {
    write.csv(hybrid_cells, "sophisticated_hybrid_cells_detected.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  }
  
  cat("✓ Data files saved\n")
}

# Save annotated Seurat object
saveRDS(merged_seurat_hmm, "merged_seurat_sophisticated_triple_annotated.rds")

# ==============================================================================
# DIAGNOSTIC FUNCTIONS
# ==============================================================================

# Create diagnostic functions
check_sophisticated_cluster_annotation <- function(cluster_id) {
  cat(sprintf("\n=== DETAILED ANALYSIS FOR CLUSTER %s ===\n", cluster_id))
  
  cluster_data <- triple_results[triple_results$cluster == cluster_id, ]
  
  if (nrow(cluster_data) == 0) {
    cat("Cluster not found!\n")
    return()
  }
  
  cat("FINDMARKERS ANALYSIS:\n")
  cat(sprintf("• Annotation: %s\n", cluster_data$FM_annotation))
  cat(sprintf("• Confidence: %d markers (Bio confidence: %.2f)\n", 
             cluster_data$FM_n_markers, cluster_data$FM_bio_confidence))
  cat(sprintf("• Evidence: %s\n", cluster_data$FM_evidence))
  
  cat("\nMANUAL SIGNATURES ANALYSIS:\n")
  cat(sprintf("• Annotation: %s\n", cluster_data$MS_annotation))
  cat(sprintf("• Confidence: %.2f (%s level)\n", 
             cluster_data$MS_confidence, cluster_data$MS_confidence_level))
  cat(sprintf("• High confidence signatures: %d\n", cluster_data$MS_n_high_conf))
  cat(sprintf("• Evidence: %s\n", cluster_data$MS_evidence))
  
  cat("\nHYBRID ANALYSIS:\n")
  cat(sprintf("• Annotation: %s\n", cluster_data$HY_annotation))
  cat(sprintf("• Confidence: %.2f (%s level)\n", 
             cluster_data$HY_confidence, cluster_data$HY_confidence_level))
  cat(sprintf("• Strong hybrids: %d, Moderate: %d\n", 
             cluster_data$HY_n_strong, cluster_data$HY_n_moderate))
  cat(sprintf("• Evidence: %s\n", cluster_data$HY_evidence))
  
  cat("\nFINAL RECONCILIATION:\n")
  cat(sprintf("• Final Annotation: %s\n", cluster_data$Final_annotation))
  cat(sprintf("• Method Used: %s\n", cluster_data$Final_method))
  cat(sprintf("• Confidence: %s\n", cluster_data$Final_confidence))
  cat(sprintf("• Supporting Evidence: %s\n", cluster_data$Final_evidence))
}

compare_methods_for_cluster <- function(cluster_id) {
  cat(sprintf("\n=== METHOD COMPARISON FOR CLUSTER %s ===\n", cluster_id))
  
  cluster_data <- triple_results[triple_results$cluster == cluster_id, ]
  
  if (nrow(cluster_data) == 0) {
    cat("Cluster not found!\n")
    return()
  }
  
  methods_df <- data.frame(
    Method = c("FindMarkers", "Manual Signatures", "Hybrid Analysis", "Final Reconciled"),
    Annotation = c(cluster_data$FM_annotation, cluster_data$MS_annotation, 
                  cluster_data$HY_annotation, cluster_data$Final_annotation),
    Confidence_Level = c(cluster_data$FM_method, cluster_data$MS_confidence_level,
                        cluster_data$HY_confidence_level, cluster_data$Final_confidence),
    Evidence = c(cluster_data$FM_evidence, cluster_data$MS_evidence,
                cluster_data$HY_evidence, cluster_data$Final_evidence)
  )
  
  print(methods_df)
  
  # Cell count for this cluster
  cluster_cell_count <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm$seurat_clusters == cluster_id)
  cat(sprintf("Cluster contains %d cells\n", cluster_cell_count))
}

# ==============================================================================
# FINAL SUMMARY AND RECOMMENDATIONS
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n", rep("=", 80), "\n")
cat("SOPHISTICATED TRIPLE ANNOTATION SYSTEM - COMPLETE\n")
cat(rep("=", 80), "\n")

cat("\n🎉 SUCCESS! Created sophisticated triple annotation system:\n\n")

cat("📊 METHOD COMPARISON:\n")
cat("1. FindMarkers Sophisticated:\n")
cat("   • Enhanced biological inference with confidence scoring\n")
cat("   • Multi-factor confidence assessment\n")
cat("   • Filtered ribosomal/mitochondrial genes\n")
cat("   • Downsampled large clusters for better statistics\n\n")

cat("2. Manual Signatures Sophisticated:\n")
cat("   • Z-score normalized within signature category\n")
cat("   • Threshold-based assignment (non-competitive)\n")
cat("   • Multiple confidence levels (High/Medium/Low)\n")
cat("   • Comprehensive curated signature library\n\n")

cat("3. Hybrid Analysis Sophisticated:\n")
cat("   • Combo scores (Up - Down) for biological relevance\n")
cat("   • Z-score normalized for fair comparison\n")
cat("   • Independent threshold assignment\n")
cat("   • Multi-level confidence (Strong/Moderate/Weak)\n\n")

# Calculate method statistics
total_cells <- ncol(merged_seurat_hmm)

# Uncharacterized rates by method
fm_unchar <- sum(grepl("Uncharacterized|^Cluster", merged_seurat_hmm$FindMarkers_Sophisticated))
ms_unchar <- sum(grepl("Uncharacterized", merged_seurat_hmm$Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated))
final_unchar <- sum(grepl("Uncharacterized", merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation))

cat("📈 ANNOTATION SUCCESS RATES:\n")
cat(sprintf("• FindMarkers: %d/%d cells characterized (%.1f%%)\n",
           total_cells - fm_unchar, total_cells, (total_cells - fm_unchar) / total_cells * 100))
cat(sprintf("• Manual Signatures: %d/%d cells characterized (%.1f%%)\n",
           total_cells - ms_unchar, total_cells, (total_cells - ms_unchar) / total_cells * 100))
cat(sprintf("• Final Reconciled: %d/%d cells characterized (%.1f%%)\n",
           total_cells - final_unchar, total_cells, (total_cells - final_unchar) / total_cells * 100))

# Hybrid detection summary
hybrid_positive_cells <- sum(grepl("Hybrid|hybrid", merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation))
if (hybrid_positive_cells > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("• Hybrid cells detected: %d (%.1f%%)\n", 
             hybrid_positive_cells, hybrid_positive_cells / total_cells * 100))
  
  # Break down by hybrid type
  for (combo_type in combo_types) {
    type_count <- sum(grepl(combo_type, merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation))
    if (type_count > 0) {
      cat(sprintf("  - %s: %d cells\n", combo_type, type_count))
    }
  }
}

# Method effectiveness analysis
cat("\n🔧 RECONCILIATION METHOD EFFECTIVENESS:\n")
top_methods <- head(sort(method_effectiveness, decreasing = TRUE), 3)
for (i in 1:length(top_methods)) {
  method_name <- names(top_methods)[i]
  count <- top_methods[i]
  cat(sprintf("%d. %s: %d clusters\n", i, method_name, count))
}

# Confidence distribution
high_conf <- sum(triple_results$Final_confidence == "High")
medium_conf <- sum(triple_results$Final_confidence == "Medium")
low_conf <- sum(triple_results$Final_confidence == "Low")

cat(sprintf("\n🎯 FINAL ANNOTATION CONFIDENCE:\n"))
cat(sprintf("• High confidence: %d clusters (%.1f%%)\n", high_conf, high_conf / n_clusters * 100))
cat(sprintf("• Medium confidence: %d clusters (%.1f%%)\n", medium_conf, medium_conf / n_clusters * 100))
cat(sprintf("• Low confidence: %d clusters (%.1f%%)\n", low_conf, low_conf / n_clusters * 100))

cat("\n📁 FILES GENERATED:\n")

if (CONFIG$save_plots) {
  cat("VISUALIZATIONS:\n")
  cat("• sophisticated_triple_annotation_comparison.png - Complete method comparison\n")
  cat("• findmarkers_sophisticated.png - FindMarkers results\n")
  cat("• manual_signatures_sophisticated.png - Manual signature results\n")
  cat("• hybrid_sophisticated.png - Hybrid analysis results\n")
  cat("• final_sophisticated_annotation.png - Final reconciled annotations\n\n")
}

if (CONFIG$save_intermediate) {
  cat("DATA FILES:\n")
  cat("• sophisticated_triple_annotation_results.csv - Complete analysis results\n")
  cat("• sophisticated_annotation_summaries.csv - Method-specific summaries\n")
  cat("• sophisticated_findmarkers_results.csv - Enhanced FindMarkers analysis\n")
  if (nrow(hybrid_cells) > 0) {
    cat("• sophisticated_hybrid_cells_detected.csv - Hybrid cell details\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
}

cat("SEURAT OBJECT:\n")
cat("• merged_seurat_sophisticated_triple_annotated.rds - Complete annotated object\n\n")

cat("🔬 NEW METADATA COLUMNS:\n")
cat("• FindMarkers_Sophisticated - Enhanced FindMarkers annotations\n")
cat("• Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated - Z-score normalized manual signatures\n")
cat("• Hybrid_Sophisticated - Combo score based hybrid detection\n")
cat("• Final_Sophisticated_Annotation - Reconciled final annotations\n")
cat("• Final_Annotation_Method - Method used for final annotation\n")
cat("• Final_Annotation_Confidence - Confidence level of final annotation\n")

cat("\n💡 USAGE RECOMMENDATIONS:\n")
cat("• Use 'Final_Sophisticated_Annotation' for publication-ready analysis\n")
cat("• Compare individual methods to understand annotation basis\n")
cat("• Focus on High and Medium confidence annotations for downstream analysis\n")
cat("• Validate hybrid cells with additional functional assays\n")
cat("• Use method-specific results for targeted analysis:\n")
cat("  - FindMarkers for data-driven discovery\n")
cat("  - Manual Signatures for literature-based validation\n")
cat("  - Hybrid Analysis for cellular plasticity studies\n")

cat("\n💬 DIAGNOSTIC FUNCTIONS AVAILABLE:\n")
cat("• check_sophisticated_cluster_annotation(cluster_id) - Detailed cluster analysis\n")
cat("• compare_methods_for_cluster(cluster_id) - Method comparison for specific cluster\n")

cat("\nAnalysis complete! Use the diagnostic functions to explore specific clusters.\n")
cat("Example: check_sophisticated_cluster_annotation('0')\n")

# Final quality check
if (any(is.na(merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation))) {
  cat("\n⚠️  WARNING: Some cells have NA annotations. Check the analysis.\n")
} else {
  cat("\n✅ Quality check passed: All cells have annotations.\n")
}

cat("\n🎊 SOPHISTICATED TRIPLE ANNOTATION SYSTEM SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED! 🎊\n")

```
# Panel M
```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# ANALYSIS AND VISUALIZATION
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== COMPREHENSIVE ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Method-specific summaries
create_method_summary <- function(annotations, method_name) {
  counts <- table(annotations)
  data.frame(
    Cell_type = names(counts),
    Cell_count = as.numeric(counts),
    Percentage = round(as.numeric(counts) / length(annotations) * 100, 2),
    Method = method_name,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>% arrange(desc(Cell_count))
}

fm_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$FindMarkers_Sophisticated, "FindMarkers")
ms_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated, "Manual Signatures")
hy_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Hybrid_Sophisticated, "Hybrid Analysis")
final_summary <- create_method_summary(merged_seurat_hmm$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation, "Final Reconciled")

# Print summaries
cat("\n=== FINDMARKERS SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(fm_summary)

cat("\n=== MANUAL SIGNATURES SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(ms_summary)

cat("\n=== HYBRID SOPHISTICATED RESULTS ===\n")
print(hy_summary)

cat("\n=== FINAL RECONCILED ANNOTATION RESULTS ===\n")
print(final_summary)

# Hybrid detection analysis
hybrid_cells <- final_summary %>% filter(grepl("Hybrid|hybrid", Cell_type))
if (nrow(hybrid_cells) > 0) {
  cat("\n=== HYBRID CELLS DETECTED ===\n")
  print(hybrid_cells)
  cat(sprintf("Total hybrid cells: %d (%.1f%%)\n", 
             sum(hybrid_cells$Cell_count), sum(hybrid_cells$Percentage)))
}

# Method effectiveness analysis
method_effectiveness <- table(triple_results$Final_method)
cat("\n=== RECONCILIATION METHOD EFFECTIVENESS ===\n")
print(method_effectiveness)

# Confidence distribution
confidence_dist <- table(triple_results$Final_confidence)
cat("\n=== FINAL ANNOTATION CONFIDENCE DISTRIBUTION ===\n")
print(confidence_dist)

# ==============================================================================
# ENHANCED VISUALIZATION WITH IMPROVED COLOR SCHEME
# ==============================================================================

if (CONFIG$save_plots && "umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
  cat("\n=== CREATING ENHANCED VISUALIZATIONS ===\n")
  
  # Define structured color palette - specific cell types get priority colors
  primary_cell_colors <- c(
    # Hybrid signatures (your specified colors) - highest priority
    "THC" = "red3",
    "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
    "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
    #"CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
    "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
    
    # Major cell types (your specified colors)
    "Epithelial cells" = "gray45",
    "Epithelial General" = "gray45",
    "Colonocytes" = "gray45",
    "Goblet cells" = "gray45",
    "Monocytes" = "cadetblue3",
    "CD14+ Monocytes" = "cadetblue3",
    "CD16+ Monocytes" = "cadetblue3",
    "NK cells" = "coral",
    "CAFs" = "purple",
    "CAF Inflammatory" = "purple",
    "CAF Myofibroblastic" = "purple",
    "CAF Matrix" = "purple",
    "B cells" = "palegreen3",
    
    # Other important cell types
    "T cells" = "dodgerblue2",
    "CD4+ T cells" = "dodgerblue2",
    "CD8+ T cells" = "royalblue4",
    "Memory T cells" = "lightblue3",
    "Regulatory T cells" = "navy",
    "Macrophages" = "darkturquoise",
    "M1 Macrophages" = "darkturquoise",
    "M2 Macrophages" = "lightseagreen",
    "Dendritic cells" = "darkorange2",
    "Plasmacytoid DCs" = "orange3",
    "Plasma cells" = "springgreen4",
    "Endothelial cells" = "hotpink3",
    "Tumor cells" = "darkred",
    "Cancer stem cells" = "maroon",
    "Platelets" = "gold2"
  )
  
  # Colors specifically reserved for uncharacterized/unknown clusters
  uncharacterized_colors <- c(
    "lightgray", "gray80", "gray70", "grey30", "gainsboro",
    "grey40", "darkgray", "dimgray", "gray60", "gray50"
  )
  
  # Additional colors for any remaining cell types (avoid primary colors)
  additional_colors <- c(
    "mediumseagreen", "#7FEFBD", "darkolivegreen", "chocolate3",
    "indianred", "forestgreen", "darkslateblue", "sienna", 
    "darkgoldenrod", "darkcyan", "darkmagenta"
  )
  
  # Function to clean annotation names and remove multi-cell designations
  clean_annotation_names_for_display <- function(annotations) {
    cleaned <- gsub("_", " ", annotations)
    
    # Remove multi-cell patterns - convert to single dominant cell type
    # Remove "Hybrid" prefix and take only the first cell type mentioned
    cleaned <- gsub("Hybrid ", "", cleaned)
    cleaned <- gsub("Potential hybrid ", "", cleaned)
    cleaned <- gsub("Potential ", "", cleaned)
    
    # For multi-cell annotations, take the first cell type mentioned
    # Pattern: "CellType1/CellType2" or "CellType1-CellType2" -> "CellType1"
    cleaned <- gsub("([^/\\-]+)[/\\-].*", "\\1", cleaned)
    
    # Clean up common issues
    cleaned <- gsub("cells cells", "cells", cleaned)
    cleaned <- gsub("General cells", "cells", cleaned)
    
    return(cleaned)
  }
  
  # Function to get colors with proper hierarchy
  get_annotation_colors <- function(annotations) {
    cleaned_annotations <- clean_annotation_names_for_display(annotations)
    unique_annotations <- unique(cleaned_annotations)
    
    # Create color mapping
    color_mapping <- character(length(unique_annotations))
    names(color_mapping) <- unique_annotations
    
    # Track used colors to avoid duplicates
    used_colors <- character(0)
    
    for (annotation in unique_annotations) {
      color_assigned <- FALSE
      
      # First priority: exact matches in primary colors
      if (annotation %in% names(primary_cell_colors)) {
        color_mapping[annotation] <- primary_cell_colors[annotation]
        used_colors <- c(used_colors, primary_cell_colors[annotation])
        color_assigned <- TRUE
      }
      
      # Second priority: partial matches for known cell types
      if (!color_assigned) {
        if (grepl("Epithelial|epithelial|Colonocyte|Goblet", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- primary_cell_colors["Epithelial cells"]
          used_colors <- c(used_colors, primary_cell_colors["Epithelial cells"])
          color_assigned <- TRUE
        } else if (grepl("Monocyte", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- primary_cell_colors["Monocytes"]
          used_colors <- c(used_colors, primary_cell_colors["Monocytes"])
          color_assigned <- TRUE
        } else if (grepl("NK", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- primary_cell_colors["NK cells"]
          used_colors <- c(used_colors, primary_cell_colors["NK cells"])
          color_assigned <- TRUE
        } else if (grepl("CAF|Fibroblast", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- primary_cell_colors["CAFs"]
          used_colors <- c(used_colors, primary_cell_colors["CAFs"])
          color_assigned <- TRUE
        } else if (grepl("B cell|B-cell", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- primary_cell_colors["B cells"]
          used_colors <- c(used_colors, primary_cell_colors["B cells"])
          color_assigned <- TRUE
        } else if (grepl("T cell|T-cell", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- primary_cell_colors["T cells"]
          used_colors <- c(used_colors, primary_cell_colors["T cells"])
          color_assigned <- TRUE
        } else if (grepl("Macrophage", annotation)) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- primary_cell_colors["Macrophages"]
          used_colors <- c(used_colors, primary_cell_colors["Macrophages"])
          color_assigned <- TRUE
        }
      }
      
      # Third priority: uncharacterized/unknown clusters get reserved colors
      if (!color_assigned && grepl("Uncharacterized|Unknown|Undefined|Cluster|unassigned", annotation, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
        available_unchar_colors <- setdiff(uncharacterized_colors, used_colors)
        if (length(available_unchar_colors) > 0) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- available_unchar_colors[1]
          used_colors <- c(used_colors, available_unchar_colors[1])
          color_assigned <- TRUE
        }
      }
      
      # Fourth priority: remaining annotations get additional colors
      if (!color_assigned) {
        available_additional_colors <- setdiff(additional_colors, used_colors)
        if (length(available_additional_colors) > 0) {
          color_mapping[annotation] <- available_additional_colors[1]
          used_colors <- c(used_colors, available_additional_colors[1])
          color_assigned <- TRUE
        } else {
          # Fallback: generate a neutral color
          color_mapping[annotation] <- paste0("gray", sample(30:90, 1))
        }
      }
    }
    
    return(color_mapping)
  }
  
  # Create enhanced plotting function
  create_enhanced_dimplot <- function(object, group_by, plot_title, custom_colors = NULL) {
    # Clean annotation names for display
    temp_annotations <- clean_annotation_names_for_display(object@meta.data[[group_by]])
    object@meta.data[[paste0(group_by, "_clean")]] <- temp_annotations
    
    # Get appropriate colors
    if (is.null(custom_colors)) {
      plot_colors <- get_annotation_colors(temp_annotations)
    } else {
      plot_colors <- custom_colors
    }
    
    # Create the plot with enhanced styling
    p <- DimPlot(object, 
                 group.by = paste0(group_by, "_clean"),
                 reduction = "umap", 
                 label = TRUE, 
                 repel = TRUE, 
                 label.size = 6,          # Your specified font size
                 cols = plot_colors,
                 pt.size = 0.5) +
      ggtitle(plot_title) +
      theme_void() +                     # Remove all axis elements
      theme(
        aspect.ratio = 1,                # Your specified aspect ratio
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),  # Font size 6
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),               # Font size 6
        legend.title = element_text(size = 6),              # Font size 6
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"),
        plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5, "pt")
      ) +
      guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2), ncol = 1))
    
    # Clean up temporary column
    object@meta.data[[paste0(group_by, "_clean")]] <- NULL
    
    return(p)
  }
  
  # Create clean plotting function without labels
  create_clean_dimplot <- function(object, group_by, plot_title, custom_colors = NULL) {
    # Clean annotation names for display and remove multi-cell designations
    temp_annotations <- clean_annotation_names_for_display(object@meta.data[[group_by]])
    object@meta.data[[paste0(group_by, "_clean")]] <- temp_annotations
    
    # Get appropriate colors
    if (is.null(custom_colors)) {
      plot_colors <- get_annotation_colors(temp_annotations)
    } else {
      plot_colors <- custom_colors
    }
    
    # Create clean plot without any labels
    p <- DimPlot(object, 
                 group.by = paste0(group_by, "_clean"),
                 reduction = "umap", 
                 label = FALSE,           # No labels on plot
                 cols = plot_colors,
                 pt.size = 0.8) +        # Slightly larger points since no labels
      ggtitle(plot_title) +
      theme_void() +                     # Remove all axis elements
      theme(
        aspect.ratio = 1,                # Your specified aspect ratio
        plot.title = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),  # Slightly larger title
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7),               # Slightly larger legend text
        legend.title = element_blank(),                     # Remove legend title for cleaner look
        legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),                # Slightly larger legend keys
        plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10, "pt")
      ) +
      guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3), ncol = 1))  # Larger legend points
    
    # Clean up temporary column
    object@meta.data[[paste0(group_by, "_clean")]] <- NULL
    
    return(p)
  }
  
  # Method comparison plots with enhanced styling
  # Standard version with labels
  p1 <- create_enhanced_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "FindMarkers_Sophisticated", 
                               "FindMarkers Sophisticated")
  
  p2 <- create_enhanced_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated",
                               "Manual Modules Sophisticated")
  
  p3 <- create_enhanced_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "Hybrid_Sophisticated",
                               "Hybrid Analysis Sophisticated")
  
  p4 <- create_enhanced_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "Final_Sophisticated_Annotation",
                               "Final Reconciled Annotation")
  
  # Clean version without labels
  p1_clean <- create_clean_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "FindMarkers_Sophisticated", 
                                  "FindMarkers Sophisticated")
  
  p2_clean <- create_clean_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "Manual_Signatures_Sophisticated",
                                  "Manual Modules Sophisticated")
  
  p3_clean <- create_clean_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "Hybrid_Sophisticated",
                                  "Hybrid Analysis Sophisticated")
  
  p4_clean <- create_clean_dimplot(merged_seurat_hmm, "Final_Sophisticated_Annotation",
                                  "Final Reconciled Annotation")
  
  # Create comparison panels
  # Standard version with labels
  comparison_panel <- (p1 | p2) / (p3 | p4)
  comparison_panel <- comparison_panel + plot_annotation(
    title = "Sophisticated Triple Annotation System - Single Cell Types",
    subtitle = "Multi-cell designations resolved to dominant cell type",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 7, hjust = 0.5)
    )
  )
  
  # Clean version without labels
  comparison_panel_clean <- (p1_clean | p2_clean) / (p3_clean | p4_clean)
  comparison_panel_clean <- comparison_panel_clean + plot_annotation(
    title = "Sophisticated Triple Annotation System - Clean Single Cell Types",
    subtitle = "Legend-based identification, single cell type per cluster",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 7, hjust = 0.5)
    )
  )
  
  # Display the plots
  print(comparison_panel)
  print(comparison_panel_clean)
  
  # Save both versions
  # Standard version with labels
  ggsave("sophisticated_triple_annotation_comparison_SINGLE.png", 
         comparison_panel, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
  
  # Clean version without labels
  ggsave("sophisticated_triple_annotation_comparison_SINGLE_CLEAN.png", 
         comparison_panel_clean, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
  
  # Save individual plots - both versions
  # Standard with labels
  ggsave("findmarkers_sophisticated_SINGLE.png", p1, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("manual_signatures_sophisticated_SINGLE.png", p2, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("hybrid_sophisticated_SINGLE.png", p3, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("final_sophisticated_annotation_SINGLE.png", p4, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  
  # Clean without labels
  ggsave("findmarkers_sophisticated_SINGLE_CLEAN.png", p1_clean, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("manual_signatures_sophisticated_SINGLE_CLEAN.png", p2_clean, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("hybrid_sophisticated_SINGLE_CLEAN.png", p3_clean, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("final_sophisticated_annotation_SINGLE_CLEAN.png", p4_clean, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  
# OPTIONAL: Save as PDF to specific directory (COMMENTED OUT)
# Uncomment the lines below to save to your specified directory
  # 
  # # Create directory if it doesn't exist
  # if (!dir.exists("250725.Fig7Final")) {
  #   dir.create("250725.Fig7Final", recursive = TRUE)
  # }
  # 
  # # Save the clean comparison panel as PDF (recommended version)
 ggsave("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelM.SophAnnots.Single.pdf", 
        comparison_panel_clean, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300, device = "pdf")
 
 # Save individual clean plots as PDFs
 ggsave("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelM.FindMarkers.Single.Clean.pdf", p1_clean, 
        width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300, device = "pdf")
 ggsave("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelM.Manual.Single.Clean.pdf", p2_clean, 
        width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300, device = "pdf")
 ggsave("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelM.Hybrid.Single.Clean.pdf", p3_clean, 
        width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300, device = "pdf")
 ggsave("250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelM.Final.Single.Clean.pdf", p4_clean, 
        width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300, device = "pdf")
  
  cat("✓ Enhanced visualizations created with single cell type designations\n")
  cat("✓ Multi-cell annotations converted to dominant cell type\n")
  cat("✓ Color hierarchy implemented: primary cell types > uncharacterized > additional\n")
  cat("✓ Uncharacterized clusters use reserved gray colors only\n")
  cat("✓ Hybrid/Potential prefixes removed for cleaner display\n")
  cat("✓ Custom colors applied for known cell types\n")
  cat("✓ Both labeled and clean versions available\n")
  cat("✓ Files saved with '_SINGLE' and '_SINGLE_CLEAN' suffixes\n")
}

```
# Panel N, O, P
```{r}
# PANELS N, O, P: HYBRID UMAP AND ANEUPLOIDY VIOLIN PLOTS
# ========================================

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)

cat("=== CREATING PANELS N, O, P ===\n")

# Define hybrid cell colors
hybrid_colors <- c(
  "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
  "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255), 
  #"CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
  "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
  "THC" = "red3"
)

# ========================================
# PANEL N: UMAP FOR HYBRID CELLS ONLY
# ========================================

create_panel_n_hybrid_umap <- function() {
  cat("Creating Panel N: Hybrid Cells UMAP\n")
  
  # Check if UMAP is available
  if(!"umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
    cat("UMAP not found. Running UMAP...\n")
    merged_seurat_hmm <- RunUMAP(merged_seurat_hmm, dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE)
  }
  
  # Find the column that contains hybrid information
  hybrid_columns <- grep("hybrid|Hybrid|CHC|THC", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
  cat("Available hybrid columns:", paste(hybrid_columns, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  # Use the first available hybrid column or create one
  if(length(hybrid_columns) > 0) {
    hybrid_col <- hybrid_columns[1]
    cat("Using column:", hybrid_col, "\n")
  } else {
    cat("No hybrid column found. Please specify the correct column name.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Get unique hybrid types
  unique_hybrids <- unique(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[hybrid_col]])
  unique_hybrids <- unique_hybrids[!is.na(unique_hybrids)]
  
  # Filter for actual hybrid cells (CHC1, CHC2, CHC3, THC)
  hybrid_cells <- unique_hybrids[unique_hybrids %in% names(hybrid_colors)]
  cat("Hybrid cell types found:", paste(hybrid_cells, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  if(length(hybrid_cells) == 0) {
    cat("No hybrid cells found in the specified column.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Create subset with only hybrid cells
  hybrid_subset <- subset(merged_seurat_hmm, cells = which(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[hybrid_col]] %in% hybrid_cells))
  
  # Create color mapping for hybrid cells only
  plot_colors <- hybrid_colors[hybrid_cells]
  
  # Create the UMAP plot
  p_panel_n <- DimPlot(
    hybrid_subset,
    group.by = hybrid_col,
    cols = plot_colors,
    pt.size = 0.8,
    label = FALSE
  ) +
    theme_void() +  # Remove all axes and labels
    theme(
      plot.title = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
    ) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Hybrid Type", override.aes = list(size = 2)))
  
  return(p_panel_n)
}

# ========================================
# PANEL O: VIOLIN PLOT - ANEUPLOIDY BY FINAL_SOPHISTICATED_ANNOTATION
# ========================================

create_panel_o_violin <- function() {
  cat("Creating Panel O: Aneuploidy by Final_Sophisticated_Annotation\n")
  
  # Check if required columns exist
  if(!"Final_Sophisticated_Annotation" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat("Final_Sophisticated_Annotation column not found.\n")
    available_cols <- grep("Final|Annotation|Sophisticated", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
    cat("Available similar columns:", paste(available_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Use copykat_pred column for aneuploidy information
  aneuploidy_col <- "copykat_pred"
  if(!aneuploidy_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat("copykat_pred column not found.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  cat("Using aneuploidy column:", aneuploidy_col, "\n")
  
  # Create stacked bar plot for categorical aneuploidy data
  # First filter for specific cell types and rename them
  plot_data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[aneuploidy_col]]) & !is.na(Final_Sophisticated_Annotation)) %>%
    filter(Final_Sophisticated_Annotation %in% c("CAF_Matrix", "Endothelial Cells", "Epithelial_General", 
                                                 "Hybrid CHC1", "Hybrid CHC2", "Hybrid CHC3", "Hybrid THC")) %>%
    mutate(
      # Rename specific cell types
      Final_Sophisticated_Annotation_Clean = case_when(
        Final_Sophisticated_Annotation == "CAF_Matrix" ~ "CAFs",
        Final_Sophisticated_Annotation == "Epithelial_General" ~ "Epithelial cells",
        TRUE ~ Final_Sophisticated_Annotation
      )
    ) %>%
    group_by(Final_Sophisticated_Annotation_Clean, .data[[aneuploidy_col]]) %>%
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Final_Sophisticated_Annotation_Clean) %>%
    mutate(
      total = sum(count),
      percentage = count / total * 100
    )
  
  p_panel_o <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Final_Sophisticated_Annotation_Clean, y = percentage, fill = .data[[aneuploidy_col]])) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("diploid" = "lightblue", "aneuploid" = "darkred")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 8)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Panel O: Aneuploidy by Final Sophisticated Annotation",
      x = "Cell Type",
      y = "Percentage (%)",
      fill = "Aneuploidy Status"
    )
  
  return(p_panel_o)
}

# ========================================
# PANEL P: VIOLIN PLOT - ANEUPLOIDY BY HYBRID DETAIL
# ========================================

create_panel_p_violin <- function() {
  cat("Creating Panel P: Aneuploidy by Hybrid Detail\n")
  
  # Find hybrid detail column
  hybrid_detail_cols <- grep("Hybrid.*Detail|hybrid.*detail|Detail.*Hybrid|detail.*hybrid", 
                            colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
  
  if(length(hybrid_detail_cols) == 0) {
    # Try broader search for hybrid columns
    hybrid_detail_cols <- grep("hybrid|Hybrid|CHC|THC", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
    cat("No specific 'Hybrid Detail' column found. Available hybrid columns:", paste(hybrid_detail_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  
  if(length(hybrid_detail_cols) == 0) {
    cat("No hybrid detail column found.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  hybrid_detail_col <- hybrid_detail_cols[1]
  cat("Using hybrid detail column:", hybrid_detail_col, "\n")
  
  # Use copykat_pred column for aneuploidy information
  aneuploidy_col <- "copykat_pred"
  if(!aneuploidy_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat("copykat_pred column not found.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Get unique hybrid types and create color mapping
  unique_hybrids <- unique(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[hybrid_detail_col]])
  unique_hybrids <- unique_hybrids[!is.na(unique_hybrids)]
  
  # Create color vector for violin plot
  violin_colors <- rep("lightgray", length(unique_hybrids))
  names(violin_colors) <- unique_hybrids
  
  # Apply hybrid colors where available
  for(hybrid_type in unique_hybrids) {
    if(hybrid_type %in% names(hybrid_colors)) {
      violin_colors[hybrid_type] <- hybrid_colors[hybrid_type]
    }
  }
  
  # Create stacked bar plot for categorical aneuploidy data
  plot_data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[aneuploidy_col]]) & !is.na(.data[[hybrid_detail_col]])) %>%
    group_by(.data[[hybrid_detail_col]], .data[[aneuploidy_col]]) %>%
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(.data[[hybrid_detail_col]]) %>%
    mutate(
      total = sum(count),
      percentage = count / total * 100
    )
  
  # Get unique hybrid types and create color mapping for the bars
  unique_hybrids <- unique(plot_data[[hybrid_detail_col]])
  
  p_panel_p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = .data[[hybrid_detail_col]], y = percentage, fill = .data[[aneuploidy_col]])) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("diploid" = "lightblue", "aneuploid" = "darkred")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 8)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Panel P: Aneuploidy by Hybrid Detail",
      x = "Hybrid Type",
      y = "Percentage (%)",
      fill = "Aneuploidy Status"
    )
  
  return(p_panel_p)
}

# ========================================
# CREATE ALL PANELS
# ========================================

# Create Panel N
panel_n <- create_panel_n_hybrid_umap()
if(!is.null(panel_n)) {
  print(panel_n)
  cat("Panel N created successfully.\n")
} else {
  cat("Failed to create Panel N.\n")
}

# Create Panel O
panel_o <- create_panel_o_violin()
if(!is.null(panel_o)) {
  print(panel_o)
  cat("Panel O created successfully.\n")
} else {
  cat("Failed to create Panel O.\n")
}

# Create Panel P
panel_p <- create_panel_p_violin()
if(!is.null(panel_p)) {
  print(panel_p)
  cat("Panel P created successfully.\n")
} else {
  cat("Failed to create Panel P.\n")
}

# ========================================
# SAVE PLOTS
# ========================================

# Create date prefix
date_prefix <- "250725"

# Save individual plots as PNG
if(!is.null(panel_n)) {
  ggsave(paste0(date_prefix, ".Panel N - Hybrid UMAP.png"), 
         plot = panel_n, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  cat("Saved:", paste0(date_prefix, ".Panel N - Hybrid UMAP.png"), "\n")
}

if(!is.null(panel_o)) {
  ggsave(paste0(date_prefix, ".Panel O - Aneuploidy by Final Annotation.png"), 
         plot = panel_o, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  cat("Saved:", paste0(date_prefix, ".Panel O - Aneuploidy by Final Annotation.png"), "\n")
}

if(!is.null(panel_p)) {
  ggsave(paste0(date_prefix, ".Panel P - Aneuploidy by Hybrid Detail.png"), 
         plot = panel_p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  cat("Saved:", paste0(date_prefix, ".Panel P - Aneuploidy by Hybrid Detail.png"), "\n")
}

# ========================================
# OPTIONAL: SAVE AS PDF IN COMBINED FILE
# ========================================

save_as_pdf <- TRUE  # Set to FALSE if you don't want PDF output

if(save_as_pdf) {
  cat("Creating combined PDF...\n")
  
  pdf(paste0(date_prefix, ".Fig7Final.pdf"), width = 12, height = 16)
  
  # Create a combined layout
  plots_to_combine <- list()
  if(!is.null(panel_n)) plots_to_combine[["Panel N"]] <- panel_n
  if(!is.null(panel_o)) plots_to_combine[["Panel O"]] <- panel_o
  if(!is.null(panel_p)) plots_to_combine[["Panel P"]] <- panel_p
  
  if(length(plots_to_combine) > 0) {
    # Arrange plots vertically
    combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plots_to_combine, ncol = 1)
    combined_plot <- combined_plot + 
      plot_annotation(
        title = "Figure 7 Final - Panels N, O, P",
        theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
      )
    
    print(combined_plot)
  }
  
  dev.off()
  cat("Saved combined PDF:", paste0(date_prefix, ".Fig7Final.pdf"), "\n")
}

# ========================================
# SUMMARY
# ========================================

cat("\n=== SUMMARY ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Panel N (Hybrid UMAP): %s\n", ifelse(!is.null(panel_n), "✓ Created", "✗ Failed")))
cat(sprintf("Panel O (Aneuploidy by Final Annotation): %s\n", ifelse(!is.null(panel_o), "✓ Created", "✗ Failed")))
cat(sprintf("Panel P (Aneuploidy by Hybrid Detail): %s\n", ifelse(!is.null(panel_p), "✓ Created", "✗ Failed")))

if(save_as_pdf) {
  cat(sprintf("Combined PDF: ✓ Created as %s.Fig7Final.pdf\n", date_prefix))
}

cat("\nHybrid colors used:\n")
for(i in 1:length(hybrid_colors)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %s: %s\n", names(hybrid_colors)[i], hybrid_colors[i]))
}
```
